programme.title: World War Weird
programme.desc: Stalin's flying saucer, a ghost army to fool Hitler and musician Glenn Miller's disappearance.

programme.title: Craig Charles: UFO Conspiracies

programme.title: On the Trail of UFOs

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim demotes a recalcitrant Anthony to assistant as punishment for disrespecting her mother and must decide whether she will fire him. Fed up with waiting for Leah to complete her mani-pedi station, Naja explodes.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra and Hank fly to NY for a photoshoot. Meeting up with friends Julie and Jon, Kendra vents to Julie about Hank's career. Jon and Hank discuss leaving the NFL. Kendra and Hank form tension.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra bombards Hank's agent with questions about NFL players' career options, embarrassing Hank. A heated debate with Hank in addition to missing Little Hank leads to Kendra having a breakdown.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra travels to Nashville to shoot her first country music video with the LoCash Cowboys. Trouble starts when she finds out she will be rolling around in the mud in a bikini.

programme.title: Kendra On Top
programme.desc: Kendra gets down and dirty shooting a sexy music video in Nashville; Hank is conflicted after he finds out Kendra will be mud wrestling.

programme.desc: Former Real Housewife, Alexis Bellino is surprised with a vow renewal bash by her husband with 1 week to pull it off. A dress disaster sends David's team into a panic one day before Cielo's first b-day party.

programme.title: David Tutera's CELEBrations
programme.desc: David Tutera throws the ultimate birthday party for former WWE Diva, Amy Weber's 5-year-old twins but her inappropriate in-laws want an adult shindig. Will this fairy-tale event crash before it takes off?

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: China is kicked out of a photo shoot with Vivica Fox after she gives the actress attitude. China retaliates in a career ending move. Kim styles Somaya Reece and hires a sexy new receptionist.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim styles actress/singer Somaya Reece. Naja and China fight over her failed shoot with Vivica Fox. Leah erupts when Anthony, Angela and Dontay wreak havoc in the salon after a liquid lunch.

programme.title: L.A. Hair
programme.desc: Kim styles Michelle Williams for her latest album cover. Angela bails on the salon without notice to go to Thailand for a week. Kim and Leah fight over a photo-shoot for Kim's new shower cap and bonnet line.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar gets questioned about having a second baby and takes a lie detector test. Tamar worries about promoting her single while busy with her talk show and fashion line. Vince is ready to bring Miracle home.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar, Vince, and friends, including reality stars Benzino and Althea, go on a mountain retreat, while Toni watches baby Logan. Things get wild during a competitive fishing trip. Vince pushes Tamar for the second baby.

programme.title: Tamar & Vince
programme.desc: Tamar prepares to drop her next album, while taping a new season of her talk show. When Vince reveals to Tamar that she'll also be competing on "Dancing With The Stars," she's concerned about balancing it all.

programme.title: Mary Mary

programme.title: Mary Mary

programme.title: Mary Mary
programme.desc: Mary Mary is back on the road for an important radio show appearance and a huge concert in front of the likes of Oprah in Dallas, but will tensions between the girls and their manager, Mitch, take center stage?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Basilio convence a Leonardo de salir para que hable con Pedro, pero Perico no está afuera. Pedro le ofrece dinero al Chamuy, quien le confirma que Leonardo es su hermano gemelo y que Humberto pagó para que se lo robaran.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Aurora ya no sabe a quién amar, si a Lorenzo o a Martín. Es más complicado aún porque su corazón y su mente juegan entre dos realidades extrañas. Nina y Natalia se juntan para recuperar el amor.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Pelear por Aurora condena a Martín a vivir su amor en silencio. Federico lo golpea en la cabeza y Martín llega inconsciente a la clínica de Gustavo. César se encarga de vengar a su hermano.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: El delito de César es la excusa perfecta de Federico para llevarse a Vanesa a la cama. Todo gracias a sus chantajes. Martín se opone a reconocer a su verdadera madre, mientras César admite a quién quiere. Elizabeth quiere toda la gloria para ella.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: La mentira del embarazo de Natalia acaba con el amor de Lorenzo, quien ahora guarda la esperanza de que Aurora vuelva a amarlo. Elizabeth trata de controlar a Aurora, pero siempre alguien se interpone. Vanesa accede a estar en la cama de Federico.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Camila le dice a Lucrecia que Pedro nunca la amará porque la ama a ella, pero a Camila le parece mejor dejar “El Talismán”. Además, tiene la intención de dejar de apoyar financieramente a su hermano.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Elvira acusa a Camila de estar destruyendo su matrimonio con Renato, él le insinuó a Elvira que no tendría acceso a una cuenta bancaria, por miedo a que su hija la manipulara para robarle su dinero.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Tracy le dice a Camila que Renato no es confiable y que la había amenazado para que no dijera que es un estafador, luego Camila decide ir y pedirle explicaciones.

programme.title: El Talismán
programme.desc: Camila sabe la verdad del famoso cheque que posee Renato. Elvira confiesa que es un cheque que Pedro le envió por el valor de “El Talismán” hace años.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?
programme.desc: Nora decide contarle a Pedro toda la verdad sobre su origen y le muestra en las cámaras de seguridad al hombre que está extorsionando a Humberto, él se da cuenta de que es el Chamoy. Tania descubre a Justino y escapa.

programme.title: ¿Quién es quién?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We traveled to chili country, cooked with various experts in their kitchens, and tried out dozens of recipes in the test kitchen. We wanted a chili that would be hearty, heavy on the meat, and spicy but not overwhelmingly hot.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Macaroni and cheese and turkey Tetrazzini are two classic casseroles, but they are rarely as good as they could be. We knew we could do better—much better—in the test kitchen.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan Roof makes host Julia Collin Davison Monterey Bay Cioppino. Equipment expert Adam Ried reveals his top pick for can openers. Morgan Bolling makes host Bridget Lancaster Shrimp Mozambique.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie Morrison makes host Bridget Lancaster Shashlik-Style Beef Kebabs. Tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges Bridget to a tasting of ground cumin. Bryan Roof makes host Julia Collin Davison Adjaruli Khachapuri.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Bryan Roof makes host Julia Collin Davison Grilled Jerk Chicken. Equipment expert Adam Ried reviews grill brushes. Christie Morrison makes Smoked Chicken Wings.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Christie Morrison and host Julia Collin Davison make Pork Carnitas. Tasting expert Jack Bishop challenges host Bridget Lancaster to a tasting of lard. Julia makes Shrimp Tacos.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia whips up her favorite fried chicken with slow-cooker buttermilk smashed potatoes, and quick collard greens with hot pepper vinegar

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia shares her recipe for easy broiled salmon with mustard and crisp dilled crust, orzo salad with cucumber, red onion, and mint, plus a pretty and pink berry fool for dessert

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia's take on comfort food includes thick-cut pork chops with smoked sea salt, garlic-scented mashed sweet potatoes with coconut milk and cilantro, a brussels sprouts and kale salad with herbs and peanuts, and her slow-cooker nutella bread pudding.

programme.title: Julia at Home
programme.desc: Julia whips up her favorite Bloody Marys with fresh horseradish and homemade cocktail onions plus sheet-pan hash browns for a crowd and springy green Shakshuka.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Pork chops are leaner than they used to be, which poses new problems for home cooks. We explain which chops to buy and how to cook them, ensuring perfectly cooked meat that is both crispy and juicy.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Ham dinner—with green bean casserole—is classic American fare. But which kind of ham should you buy? And can you really make a "good" green bean casserole? We show you how.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Our sour cream coffee cake and light, flavorful fruit salads transform weekend brunch into an indulgent meal you'll want to make even when company isn't coming over. A few tips on great coffee round out the perfect start to a day.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: The appeal of such quick bread as cinnamon buns and banana bread is clear. Supermarket cinnamon buns often have an odd, artificial flavor and sponge-like texture. And banana bread doesn't need to taste like over-the-hill bananas.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Real country bread, the kind made by an artisan and never found at the supermarket, is a thing of beauty. We wanted to develop a recipe that was every bit as good as the best country loaves but that was still doable for the cook who bakes in a home oven.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Thick, chewy chocolate cookies and spiced molasses cookies are classics. Watch as we discover which types of chocolate and molasses make these favorites great again.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Lemon meringue pie is a three-part recipe—crust, lemon filling, and meringue—and each one can be a challenge. We discover which rolling pins are best and whether you can use store-bought pie crust in a pinch. Then we perfect the filling and meringue.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more American than strawberry shortcake? But sometimes this classic summer fare can go terribly wrong. When it comes to cherry cobbler, sour cherries are a must. But where do you get sour cherries? Are jarred cherries a worthy alternative?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Who can resist a chocolate cake? We wanted cakes that would be great tasting and easy to prepare, and we came up with two: old-fashioned, moist, and homey; the other elegant, dense, and ethereal.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: A true New York-style cheesecake should be pure and minimalist but also have just the right color, flavor, and density. With a crisp graham cracker crust and a filling that fades from creamy to cake-like, our cheesecake is worthy of any diner in New York.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to create flavorful, fresh-tasting versions of Greek and spinach salads.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Chili is probably America's favorite one-pot supper and we wanted to create a great, simple version. And while no one thinks of a clambake as a one-pot wonder, we set out to make an indoor version simple enough to prepare even on a busy weeknight.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We go to the test kitchen to show how to make the perfect clam chowder and delicious crab cakes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Watch as we figure out the best recipes for two New Orleans favorites—Jambalaya and bananas Foster.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Tomatoes and pasta are a classic (and delicious) pairing, but sometimes you want a change. Vegetable sauces, like the two featured in this episode—one with mushrooms and one with broccoli rabe—are appealing options.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Some pasta dishes take considerable time to prepare. But others don't have to. We set out to streamline Bolognese and baked four-cheese pasta to make them weeknight dining.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: When it comes out right, pot roast is tender, succulent, and richly flavored. Good pot roast begins at the market, and we've found that cooking technique matters just as much as the cut.

programme.title: American Sunrise
programme.desc: Morning news with the Real America's Voice team live from West Palm Beach, Florida.

programme.title: The War Room
programme.desc: Steve Bannon and the team brings important news from around the world.

programme.title: The Charlie Kirk Show
programme.desc: Charlie Kirk, the founder and president of Turning Point USA, talks current events, the principles of free markets and limited government.

programme.title: Human Events Daily
programme.desc: Unfiltered and factual updates on how current events will impact the country today and in the future.

programme.title: Georgia Town Hall Event
programme.desc: President Trump at the Believers and Ballots Faith Town Hall with Lt Gov Burt Jones in Georgia.

programme.title: War Room: Special Coverage
programme.desc: Steve Bannon and team dive deep into the election results.

programme.title: TP PAC & TP Action Georgia Rally
programme.desc: Live coverage of the TP PAC/TP Action Georgia rally featuring President Donald Trump as special keynote speaker.

programme.title: Live From Studio 6B
programme.desc: Unique perspectives and commentaries on current events.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A night at the beach in his brother's truck sends a repeat offender back to jail; a Christmas morning hold-up leaves a young man dead and four people in jail with serious charges.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A first time inmate says he must turn to violence to avoid becoming a victim, an accused rapist gets into more trouble in jail and what he does next has some questioning his motives.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Gang violence breaks out when a long-simmering feud boils over; caught in the middle of the conflict is a young inmate, and jail staff responds with an all-out search for weapons.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A group of prisoners are entrusted with potential weapons, but for the benefit of others; one of them hopes this assignment will result in a life-long bond; back at the jail, an inmate brawl leaves several officers injured.

programme.title: Lockup
programme.desc: Inmates at Tennessee Prison For Women gain career skills by taking part in a cosmetology program.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: California State Prison, Corcoran is a turbulent sea of politics: from old school prison gangs to disruptive street gangs, it's a dangerous mix for staff and inmates; known gang members are sent to security housing units to control their activity.

programme.title: Lockup: Corcoran: Extended Stay
programme.desc: Prison is a lonely place for any inmate; relationships that existed on the outside become strained and the ones that blossom within the prison walls are often dangerous; or they can be simply a one-sided obsession, leading to nothing but trouble.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A female inmate finds romance with an alleged gang leader and the jailhouse prepares for a wedding; a very powerful inmate must make a choice between his crime family and his real family.

programme.title: Lockup: Long Island: Extended Stay
programme.desc: A young couple comes to jail after a crime spree, but their stories don't add up; one of the jail's most prolific contraband smugglers makes her return, but staff cracks down on the pipeline.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Youpi is impressed by the extermination team's abilities and acknowledges their strength.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Morel destroys the cocoon before him, but as he suspected, Pouf is not inside.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 2
programme.desc: The power of Alessi's Stand "Set" has turned Polnareff back into a child, leaving him confused and alone. A passerby named Marena takes the boy into her home to help him, but they are followed by Alessi and his terrible powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 1
programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 2
programme.desc: After losing to D'Arby, Joseph and Polnareff have their souls taken. In order to have their souls returned, Jotaro shows off Star Platinum's powers before beginning a match with D'Arby, warning him that cheating won't work.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 1
programme.desc: Hol Horse arrives at Cairo in order to pursue Jotaro and the others. He has joined forces with another partner and is after the lives of Jotaro and crew once more. What's more, his new partner is none other than Mondatta.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hol Horse and Mondatta, Part 2
programme.desc: Following Mondatta's prediction, Hol Horse sticks his fingers into Polnareff's nose, but he doesn't know what to do from there. Making matters worse, Jotaro and the others show up in search of Polnareff, forcing Hol Horse into a tough spot.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: The Guardian of Hell, Pet Shop, Part 1
programme.desc: Jotaro and his friends continue to search for DIO's mansion in Cairo. Following Avdol's advice, they have a beggar look for the mansion and wait. Meanwhile, Iggy, wandering the city alone, is confronted by two large dogs.

programme.desc: Sage receives a word from the Ancient One.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Kidnapping the team one by one, Talpa begins his sinister plot.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: Rowen's powers have taken a new turn.

programme.title: Samurai Troopers (Ronin Warriors)
programme.desc: The Ancient One finds an enemy.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Youpi transforms and splits up the group with his attack. Morel lets Shoot and Knuckle handle things while he heads for the King.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The King faces off against Netero and Zeno.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Knuckle suddenly appears before Youpi to fight him head on.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Zeno's cryptic words to Killua and Gon becomes clear when they reach the tower.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Feeling the need to lay a punch on Youpi to avenge his friend Shoot, Knuckle decides to take on Youpi once more.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Ikalgo reads Palm's hidden message, which says that she has gone to the palace and to assume that she is dead if she does not respond before the start of the mission.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Youpi is impressed by the extermination team's abilities and acknowledges their strength.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Morel destroys the cocoon before him, but as he suspected, Pouf is not inside.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Bast's Mariah, Part 2
programme.desc: Due to the powers of an enemy Stand, Joseph's body becomes magnetized. While chasing after the woman he suspects is the Stand user, Joseph learns that Avdol has also become magnetized from touching a different electrical outlet.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 1
programme.desc: With Joseph and Avdol busy fighting Mariah, Jotaro and Polnareff get concerned about why they haven't shown up yet. As the two search Luxor, Polnareff senses someone following them and confronts the man.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Set's Alessi, Part 2
programme.desc: The power of Alessi's Stand "Set" has turned Polnareff back into a child, leaving him confused and alone. A passerby named Marena takes the boy into her home to help him, but they are followed by Alessi and his terrible powers.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: D'Arby the Gambler, Part 1
programme.desc: After a long journey, Jotaro and his friends finally reach Cairo. They begin asking about the location of DIO's palace and find one man who says he has information, but will only answer if the group can beat him in a game.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A new Trip sees experts Roo Irvine and Angus Ashworth searching for antiques in Northern Ireland. Expect silver jewelry and Victorian furniture made from an unlikely material.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Angus Ashworth traverse southwest Wales in style, on land and on water. Angus buys cheap, while Roo buys big.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Roo Irvine and Angus Ashworth continue to scour the shops of south Wales for antiques. There are Welsh breakfasts, high-speed boats, and a little panic buying.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Arusha "Roo" Irvine and Angus Ashworth hit the shops of the west country looking for treasure. But do the bidders in Exmouth like what they've bought?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's last time out for experts Arusha "Roo" Irvine and Angus Ashworth, shopping in the west country for their final auction. Roo enjoys the fun of the fair while Angus enjoys a tipple.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Stephanie Connell start a Road Trip from Cockermouth, though there are doubts they'll make it to the Kendal auction when their classic car breaks down.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Stephanie Connell has a surprise in store for birthday boy Philip Serrell as they cross Caledonia on the second leg of their Trip. Expect gold panning and a novel buy in a book shop.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Stephanie Connell are cruising Caledonia in pursuit of profit. Phil eats a square sausage while Steph becomes puppet master. Who'll triumph at the auction in Hamilton?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and Steph Connell return to Scotland. While all roads point to Dunfermline for auction, Phil sets sail and Steph buys a paddle.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's experts Stephanie Connell and Philip Serrell's final outing in their classic car and they're in the northeast of England looking for winning wares. The deciding auction is in Darlington.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In their first Road Trip together, experts Catherine Southon and James Braxton compete for auction glory as they browse, barter and banter across the Home Counties in a 1969 Rover.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Catherine Southon and James Braxton's antiques adventure takes them through Worcestershire, Warwickshire and the West Midlands. Can James make a profit to catch Catherine?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A few pounds separate rival antiquers Catherine Southon and James Braxton. Tactics come into play ahead of a South Yorkshire auction. But there's time to savor a local delicacy.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Catherine Southon and James Braxton's take their antiques hunt to Derbyshire and Leicestershire. How do Catherine's 18th-century caryatid carvings measure up against James's very old bowl full of marbles?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Featured treasures include a valuable silver fruit bowl damaged in a domestic tiff.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Pieces featured include a poignant reminder from the battlefields of World War One.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to the backdrop of the Farnborough wind tunnels.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team head for the races as they arrive at Chepstow Racecourse.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A second visit for Fiona Bruce and the experts at Stowe School in Buckinghamshire.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts return to the Scarborough Spa Pavilion for another busy day.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: This is the second episode from RAF Marham, Norfolk.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The antiques series returns as Fiona Bruce and the team head around the UK. The first venue is Polesden Lacey near Dorking in Surrey.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A return visit to Wightwick Manor for Fiona Bruce and the experts. Discoveries include two drawings made by one of Britain's greatest artists.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at Eastbourne Bandstand. Family treasures featured include a collection of pottery with a moving story.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the experts pay a second visit to East Sussex as they welcome thousands of visitors to Eastbourne Bandstand.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to Fountains Abbey near Ripon in Yorkshire. Objects brought in by visitors include a sentimental jewel.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Wildlife in and around Africa's waterways.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The riches of the Caribbean and the processes that shape them.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: An exploration of the stunning underwater treasures of the Caribbean Sea, including the world's second largest barrier reef and countless shipwrecks.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The survival stories of the islands' wildlife residents following the Caribbean hurricane season.

programme.title: Wild Caribbean
programme.desc: The wild shore of Central America is the Caribbean's more mysterious side, with beautiful archipelagos of hundreds of islands and wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: The central island of Honshu is home to over 100 million people, but is also home to an astonishing range of wildlife.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: In the far south of Japan, there is a a place where all life is influenced by the power of the sea, and where volcanoes and typhoons are forces to be reckoned with.

programme.title: Wild Japan
programme.desc: Japan's northernmost island, Hokkaido is a place totally unlike the rest of the country. Every year it swings from a bitter Siberian winter into the warmth of a Mediterranean-like summer.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Isolated and unstable mountains test the survival skills of wildlife in Africa.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Savannahs are dynamic, energy-rich worlds of grasses and trees.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Animals and plants find ingenious ways to survive in the desert.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: The rare and beautiful wildlife along the coasts of Africa.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: With an abundance of sunlight and rainfall, plants dominate in African rainforests.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Wildlife in and around Africa's waterways.

programme.title: Simply Italian
programme.desc: Michela visits the Cinque Terre coastline in northeast Italy where she reveals how to create the perfect filled pasta.

programme.title: Simply Italian
programme.desc: Michela Chiappa explores some amazing variations of pasta. Includes a gorgeous tri-colored gnocchi served with a creamy hazelnut sauce.

programme.title: Nigellissima
programme.desc: Nigella introduces her love of Italian food through a spectacular yet simple Sicilian pasta with tomatoes, garlic and almonds, and a mid-week family feast of tagliata.

programme.title: Nigellissima

programme.desc: Mitch struggles with Neely's lies and the truth about their shipboard wedding. Cody and April race to save survivors of their plane crash. A tragic turn of events puts April in mortal danger when half the plane's fuselage sinks beneath the Pacific.

programme.title: Bellator 194: Nelson vs Mitrione
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun with heavyweight grand prix action, as Matt Mitrione and Roy "Big Country" Nelson go to battle with each man looking to advance to the semi finals. Also on the card, KO artist Patricky Pitbull and Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back with a bantamweight world title fight as Darrion Caldwell looks to defend his belt against dangerous opponent Leandro Higo. Card also features the return of baddest man on the planet, Joe Warren, as he takes on veteran Joe Taimanglo.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Budapest with a lightweight showdown between Benson Henderson and Roger Huerta. Also on the card, heavy-handed wrestling phenom Ed Ruth and Bellator Kickboxing Champ Denise Kielholtz return to MMA.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in St. Louis, MO with a barnburner main event as former lightweight champ Michael Chandler takes on Brandon Girtz. Also on the card, undefeated phenom, AJ McKee puts his record on the line when he meets Justin Lawrence.

programme.title: Bellator 198: Fedor vs Mir
programme.desc: Bellator MMA heads to Chicago, IL with a historic matchup in the Heavyweight Grand Prix as two former world champs collide when Fedor Emelianenko takes on Frank Mir. Plus Neiman Gracie returns to action, while submission ace Dillon Danis makes his debut.

programme.title: Bellator 199: Bader vs King Mo
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to San Jose with an absolutely stacked fight card as Ryan Bader collides with King Mo in Heavyweight Grand Prix action; Paul Daley takes on Jon Fitch in a dynamic matchup at welterweight, and Cheick Kongo and Javy Ayala go toe to toe.

programme.title: Bellator 200: Carvalho vs Mousasi
programme.desc: Bellator MMA’s historic 200th event in London features Rafael Carvalho putting his middleweight world title on the line against one of the best in the world, Gegard Mousasi. Plus, Michael “Venom” Page looks to finish David “The Caveman” Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator 201: Macfarlane vs Lara
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to California as women’s flyweight world champion Ilima-Lei Macfarlane looks to defend her title against fast-rising Colombian sensation Alejandra Lara. Ryan Couture takes on Saad Awad, and Juan Archuleta returns to action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville, OK as Julia Budd puts her women’s featherweight world championship on the line against the undefeated Talita Nogueira in the main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Sioux Falls as South Dakota native Logan Storley looks to extend his undefeated streak as he takes on the always dangerous AJ Matthews. Bantamweight king Darrion Caldwell moves up to featherweight to face Noad.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melvin says he is torn between his wife of eight years, Rachel, and his girlfriend of two years, Chantelle, and he wants Dr. Phil to help decide whom he should choose. When the women meet face to face for the first time, does Dr. Phil help him choose?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Natalie, 22, says her boyfriend Justin, 25, has an anger problem, and she fears for her life and for their 10-month-old son. Both admit their child has witnessed turmoil. Does this young relationship have a future?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: With Nancy Grace, children's rights attorney Paul Mones & criminologist Dr. Denise Boots, Dr. Phil delves into the headlines: a starved & beaten teen escaping his torturers, an 8-year-old boy arrested for killing his father & two reporters found dead.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kim & ex-husband, Ryan, are terrified of son, Rylan, 7, who has a fascination with knives, talks to an imaginary friend named "Bleeder", and has sent two teachers to the hospital. What might be causing Rylan's aggressive behavior?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a gripping two-part series, Dr. Phil sits down with a family torn apart over accusations of the unthinkable. Melody says her 4-year-old granddaughter revealed that she was touched inappropriately by a man in a mask, and that the man was her daddy.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: With over 1 billion views across social media platforms, 17-year-old Jack says he'll do almost anything for a "like" and is known for posting outlandish pranks, and "Karen" videos. But how far is too far? Jack's parents fear for Jack's future.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Lovie says a viral video of her son Darnell shows him attacking his girlfriend & dragging her. Darnell says he doesn't recognize himself & he wants to apologize to the world. Brianna says the attack was one of three beatings her sister endured that night.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Cassie is stressed raising 4 children--Brinley, 15, smokes pot, vapes, and runs away, once claiming kidnapping. Cassie's husband, Jonah, with his drug & alcohol abuse, is a danger to her children. Dr. Phil enlists Brinley's help to enlighten the family.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Heather's son, Brandon, 15, died of an accidental overdose at her home; authorities say the teen swallowed & snorted Heather's morphine pills while drinking vodka and beer. Acquitted of charges, Heather says her ex-husband Brian continues to blame her.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Renee & Lee insist their little granddaughter is not safe in the care of her parents because they are severe alcoholics. Chris & Jessica admit to alcoholism yet insist they are great parents. Dr. Phil shows shocking footage of what home cameras captured.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Susie says she's at the end of her rope raising her 4-yr-old granddaughter & says daughter Adriana, 20, neglects her duties to spend time boyfriend Matt. Adriana strongly denies. Matt says he's judged for past drug use. Don't miss this emotional Dr. Phil.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Inside the “California House of Horrors” where 13 children were starved, chained and abused by their own parents. Family, neighbors and childhood friends speak about the tragedy. Cleveland kidnap survivor Michelle Knight sends a message to the children.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After former friends Randi & Haley tell Brittany's history of harassing men & faking pregnancies, Dr. Phil talks to Brittany and asks her to prove she is pregnant. What sent Brittany storming off stage? See the backstage conversation with Dr. Phil.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kristle, Kayla & Patrick say mom Sherry has blown a $250,000 inheritance in 11 months, with $500 bar tabs & new motorcycles. But that's not it. They say mom takes non-prescribed pills, washes them down with rum & has pulled out a loaded gun while arguing.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro reports to the induction center after getting his draft notice. The Army isn't quite sure what to make of Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Since Granny can't plant crops in their yard, Jed thinks the solution is to buy her a plot a land somewhere else. He figures a place called Happy Acres is the best spot to buy land, not realizing it's a cemetery.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks he wants to be a naval frogman, but Granny is concerned her tonic has transformed him. Mr. Drysdale, concerned about finances, has Miss Jane distract Jethro with comics, causing him to want to fly to the moon.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro heads down to the Reserves HQ while wearing an ancestor's Confederate Army uniform. The Sergeant thinks he's an actor there to participate in a Civil War reenactment. Jethro runs home to tell Granny the Civil War is still on.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Col. Blake asks the actor playing Gen. Grant to play along with Granny so that the Civil War movie can continue. Meanwhile, Jethro uses his 6th grade education to take the written test to enter the Reserves.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro believes his moment for Hollywood stardom has arrived. Casting for Bachelor Sheriff Knows Best is occurring, and Jethro mistakenly thinks he has been chosen.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny competes against Mrs. Drysdale as artists and tells Jed about her uncle, the barn painter. Jed and Jethro go to an upscale gallery to buy a painting, but are mistaken for gardeners. Bessie the chimp dabbles with a paintbrush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Ellie seems to be no longer interested in Dash Riprock Granny decides it's time to do a little matchmaking. She thinks the handsome actor would be perfect for Miss Jane.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale talks the Clampetts into hiring a housekeeper. Unfortunately, the housekeeper that is hired is uninterested in doing housework.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's old friend, the widow Adaline Ashley, comes to Beverly Hills, and Granny sets to playing matchmaker for her and Jed. Mrs. Drysdale and her snooty friends are misled to believe Adaline is a socialite jet-setter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro decides to turn his favorite thing, eating, into a job by getting the family involved in buying a diner. The family's choice of offerings lead to a lack of customers, so Mr. Drysdale tries to fix things.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro, worried that his diner the Hungry Gizzard has no customers, has a wonderful idea. He busts in on Mr. Drysdale trying to impress the wealthy Vanderpools, announcing the restaurant is going topless. Confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to leave sunny California because she misses winter, sending Mr. Drysdale into a panic. The banker enlists Miss Jane in an elaborate scheme to convince the Clampetts that a blizzard has occurred.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The last televised wrestling match was such a success that the promoter wants a rematch. Granny isn't interested until Rebecca's parents visit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is worried about Miss Jane's spinsterhood and convinces Jethro to ask her to marry him. Granny assures him that she will decline the proposal, but Hathaway accepts, leading to panic in the Clampett household.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is on the warpath concerning the chaos caused by Ellie's critters and declares either they go or she does. Mr. Drysdale is equally irritated by the expense of his wife's poodle. Jed tries to find a solution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny and Jethro believe they have psychic abilities, but Granny's predictions stop coming true. With her reputation on the line, she picks a stock for Mr. Drysdale that could cost him a small fortune.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Heading to England, Jethro smuggles Ellie's turkey buzzard on the plane upsetting Mr. Drysdale and a fellow passenger. After landing, they try to meet with the Queen to give her their 80 million dollars. Their butler Faversham tries to clear things up.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After the Clampetts return from London, Granny gets a letter from Hooterville asking her to help with Betty Jo Elliot's baby.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale casts Dash Riprock as Homer Noodleman, a potential new lover for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.desc: Tonight, all three parts of the Head of Household competition play out. Who will emerge victorious and earn the power to cast the final eviction vote of BB 24? Plus, the jury returns to choose the winner of the $750,000 grand prize.

programme.title: Webster
programme.desc: A weekend at Wisconsin Dells with parents of Webster's best friend reveals more than Katherine and George want to see, they are nudists.

programme.title: Webster
programme.desc: Katherine's rich Uncle Charles visits for Christmas. George is worried Webster is forgetting the important part of the season.

programme.title: Webster

programme.title: Sister, Sister

programme.title: Sister, Sister

programme.title: Sister, Sister

programme.title: Roc

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: When the Emerson brothers get a bit drunk, Joey confesses a secret to Roc that still affects their relationship with their father, Andrew.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Lamont may be in for a fight when he tries to change Fred's bigoted attitude toward other minorities. He finally leaves home after Fred refuses to allow a sensitivity group to meet at the Sanford home.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Greed gets in the way when a Japanese land development company offers to buy the Sanford house. Even though Lamont is delighted with the money, Fred thinks he can get much more and decides to pay the realtor a 'personal' visit at her home.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: When Fred buys a horse with an impressive racing history in order to breed him and make millions, he fails to notice that the broken-down animal has been gelded. He tries to cover up his mistake by covering up the horse's.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred is determined to avoid a visit by his niece Elizabeth, the 'spitting image' and namesake of his late wife. But once she arrives, Fred is completely taken by her and her life is completely overtaken by her suddenly protective uncle.

programme.desc: Cuando la esposa de un prometedor congresista desaparece, la UAC investiga a sus enemigos políticos como posibles sospechosos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny se encarga de un caso personal que involucra a un miembro del cartel de la droga, Louis Delgado, quien Danny cree que es responsable por incendiar su casa. Erin es ascendida en la oficina del fiscal, pero se encuentra en una situación difícil.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Gormley busca ayuda de Danny y Baez para localizar a un ex detective de la policía de Nueva York que puede ser una amenaza para la seguridad de Frank.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny investiga un caso que involucra a una mujer que le disparó a su marido cuando estuvo borracha. Los instintos de Danny le dicen que hay más detrás de la historia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York experiencia un gran apagón, los policías se esfuerzan a contener el caos. Frank después descubre algunas verdades desagradables sobre su departamento.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El cuñado del director Vance es el principal sospechoso cuando Gibbs y el equipo de NCIS investigan el asesinato de un marinero.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después del asesinato de un infante de marina, Tony y Ziva buscan a un teniente y capellán desaparecidos en Colombia con un amigo de Ziva. Mientras tanto, Jimmy elige padrino de boda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de un incendio en un almacén que revela documentos de la Marina desaparecidos, el equipo de NCIS se une a la investigación de la policía de Baltimore, reencontrando a Tony con un joven de su pasado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: NCIS investiga un incendio en un buque. Se eleva la seguridad en instalaciones navales. DiNozzo y Ziva van a Italia por un dispositivo explosivo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The remaining rednecks decide to liven up camp-life by pulling pranks on each other, building a waterslide, and giving some of the guys their first pedicures. All the primping and fun stops when one team loses the challenge.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The lines in the sand between the Orange and Blue teams get erased when Steve Austin makes a surprise visit to camp to announce a major shift in the competition: Contestants will now be competing individually instead of as teams.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: It is down to the final five. After a day of bowling and fishing, a sharp-shooting challenge makes one contestant safe from elimination while putting two others on the firing line.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: With only four contestants remaining, alliances get put to the ultimate test. Meanwhile, contestants sink their teeth into their next challenge, literally, in an eating contest. The exotic fare proves challenging to stomach in many ways.

programme.title: Redneck Island
programme.desc: The final three contestants face their last series of challenges, as only two will battle it out to decide the winner of Redneck Island and the $100,000 grand prize.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Eight modern-day cowboys and cowgirls train to compete for the first-ever million-dollar prize in horse reining, one of the toughest and most dangerous sports in the world.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: As the riders prepare for the Cactus Classic, Matt struggles when his horse has health issues, and Abby feels the pressure in her first competition since going solo.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy
programme.desc: Leading up to the Run for a Million show, Andrea undercuts Matt's search for the perfect horse, Abby deals with a flooded practice arena, and Craig seeks a much-needed payday.

programme.title: The Last Cowboy

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quiet passenger makes a run for it during a traffic stop, a stolen puppy is safely returned to its family, and a struggling woman hits a speed bump on her road to recovery.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Códigos de guerra
programme.desc: John Woo dirige este épico drama de acción sobre un soldado de la Segunda Guerra Mundial (Nicolas Cage) asignado para proteger a un soldado navajo (Adam Beach) ... y el código secreto que conoce.

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana
programme.desc: Un pronosticador del tiempo de Chicago (Cage), separado de su esposa y sus hijos, se cuestiona si el éxito profesional y el éxito personal se excluyen mutuamente.

programme.title: Cesar Chavez
programme.desc: Michael Peña interpreta a César Chávez, que inspiró a millones de estadounidenses a luchar por la justicia social. Su viaje triunfal es un testimonio del poder de un individuo para cambiar el mundo.

programme.title: Más fuerte que el destino
programme.desc: Una victima del ataque terrorista del maratón de Boston en el 2013, ayuda a la policía a rastrear a los asesinos mientras lucha para recuperarse de un trauma devastador.

programme.title: Desde Mexico con amor
programme.desc: Un entrenador fracasado toma a un joven boxeador autodestructivo (Kuno Becker) bajo su ala.

programme.title: El sol de cada mañana
programme.desc: Un pronosticador del tiempo de Chicago (Cage), separado de su esposa y sus hijos, se cuestiona si el éxito profesional y el éxito personal se excluyen mutuamente.

programme.title: Ella espera un bebé
programme.desc: Jake y Kristi eran dos jóvenes solteros locos y enamorados. Pero un año después, se convirtieron en dos adultos locos y casados atravesando una fase de transición.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer interpreta a Frankie, una camarera en una cafetería de Nueva York. Después de una serie de relaciones desafortunadas, lo último que Frankie busca es un hombre nuevo... hasta que él viene a buscarla.

programme.title: Cumbres Borrascosas
programme.desc: La intemporal historia de amor y pasión de Emily Bronte se hace realidad en esta emotiva versión cinematográfica que protagonizan Juliette Binoche y Ralph Fiennes.

programme.title: Bride & Prejudice
programme.desc: Basada en la novela de Jane Austen, Pride and Prejudice, en un remolino musical, la chispa se encienda (y las culturas chocan) entre una belleza de pueblo y un estadounidense rico. Una aclamada pieza del director Gurinder Chadha.

programme.title: Ella espera un bebé
programme.desc: Jake y Kristi eran dos jóvenes solteros locos y enamorados. Pero un año después, se convirtieron en dos adultos locos y casados atravesando una fase de transición.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer interpreta a Frankie, una camarera en una cafetería de Nueva York. Después de una serie de relaciones desafortunadas, lo último que Frankie busca es un hombre nuevo... hasta que él viene a buscarla.

programme.title: Iron Monkey
programme.desc: Presentado por Quentin Tarantino, Iron Monkey es el brioso relato de una misteriosa y mítica leyenda china de artes marciales excitantes e incesantes.

programme.title: El cuervo 2: Ciudad de Ángeles
programme.desc: Esta secuela veloz y llena de acción de "El cuervo" sigue el ascenso de la víctima de asesinato Ashe Corven, que regresa a la vida gracias a un misterioso cuervo. Con la ayuda de una mujer llamada Sarah, se venga de sus asesinos uno por uno.

programme.title: Actos de venganza
programme.desc: Un abogado de hablar rápido (Antonio Banderas) transforma su cuerpo y toma un voto de silencio, que no se romperá hasta que descubra quién mató a su esposa e hija y tenga su venganza.

programme.title: Regreso al infierno
programme.desc: Cuando período de servicio en Irak llega a su fin, cuatro soldados estadounidenses se enteran de que están programados pare emprender una misión final. Una misión profética que cambiará eternamente el concepto que tenían hasta ahora de guerra.

programme.title: El gran rescate
programme.desc: En medio de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, el Batallón nro. 6 de exploradores recibe una misión de proporciones heroicas: ir 50 kilómetros tras las líneas enemigas y liberar a más de 500 prisioneros de guerra estadounidenses.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: Actos de venganza
programme.desc: Un abogado de hablar rápido (Antonio Banderas) transforma su cuerpo y toma un voto de silencio, que no se romperá hasta que descubra quién mató a su esposa e hija y tenga su venganza.

programme.title: Del amor y otros demonios
programme.desc: Una mordida de perro cambia la vida de Sierva y es abandonada hasta que conoce a un cura.

programme.title: Perfectos desconocidos
programme.desc: Cuando un grupo de mejores amigos se reúne durante un eclipse lunar para compartir una cena íntima en la elegante casa de Eva y Antonio, sospechan que se trata de otra noche cualquiera hasta que la anfitriona les propone un juego.

programme.title: La boda de Valentina
programme.desc: Valentina tiene la vida perfecta en Estados Unidos. Su universo tiembla cuando su novio Jason le propone matrimonio y debe enfrentar a su familia, “los perfectos Tate”, con la suya, “los Hidalgo”, la dinastía política más caótica de la historia de México.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: No manches Frida 2
programme.desc: El exconvicto reformado, Zequi (Omar Chaparro), enfrenta una crisis cuando su boda con Lucy (Martha Higareda) se cancela. Mientras intenta recuperar su amor, debe liderar a su escuela en un torneo crucial contra el exnovio perfecto de Lucy. ¡Caos total!

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Compadres

programme.title: La mitad siniestra

programme.title: Presencias del más allá

programme.title: Siete psicópatas y un perro

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Forty-one years after the crime, a woman implicates her brother and cousin in the murder of a policeman.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A man suspected of the cold case murder of his wife and son hatches a new plot to kill his mother and father; and detectives solve the 20-year-old murder of a teenager by tricking her killer into licking an envelope.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A bloody dagger and a phone tap help detectives solve a 20-year-old murder case. And DNA taken from an eyelash found on a dead prostitute's body brings a killer to justice.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police in Overland Park, Kansas, hunt for over 15 years for a serial killer who lures women to Kansas for sadomasochistic sexual trysts at hotels.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police reopen a rape-murder case 25 years after the crime and find enough DNA evidence to bring him to justice. And a confession made to a "Baywatch" TV star helps police solve the three-year-old riddle of a wealthy Newport Beach woman's murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Detectives are baffled when two young girls are raped, murdered, and dumped in an abandoned house in Akron, Ohio. And a 26-year-old mother of three disappears on Christmas Eve in 1995, but the missing person case goes cold when police can find few clues

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: While hiking with husband Dennis in Montana, Leslee Larson fell into Wolf Creek. Then Dennis is convicted of murdering his wife, while in Main. And 15-year-old papergirl Penny Parker goes missing, then her body is found by a search volunteer.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police must wait nearly 30 years before advances in DNA technology give them the chance to convict the killer of a young hitchhiker, and Philadelphia police wage a 16-year hunt for the man who raped and killed a 10-year-old girl.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: With access to the San Francisco Police Department's work, including saliva samples taken from letters the infamous Zodiac Killer sent 30 years ago, we reevaluate the case of the serial killer who began terrorizing California in the late 1960s.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl's mother is murdered and 20 years later she helps bring the killer to justice, and a dogged policeman gets to the bottom of the brutal murder of a 63-year-old newspaper delivery woman.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When 36-year-old computer programmer Lisa Valdez fails to show up for work, her apartment manager finds her brutally murdered. Detectives ask, could she be the victim of a brutal serial killer? Or was Lisa murdered by someone she knew?

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In 1979 Janie Landers disappears from a home for the impaired--the latest consequence of the facility's history of neglect. When Janie's body is found, there are many suspects but it is years before the killer is found.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: When a 30-year-old mother fails to report for duty in Virginia, the Army lists her as AWOL. Her family immediately suspects foul play. They embark on a 13-year quest for answers before an eyewitness blows the case wide open.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The murder of a 73-year-old man leads police on a long chase for a man who's suspected of identity theft and bears a rose tattoo with the name "Phyllis".

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Abbi Jacobson, Josh Charles, Amber Tamblyn, Jane Krakowski and Jillian Bell salute Margaret Sanger's crusade for accessible birth control, the creation of the Kinsey scale, and Gloria Steinem's undercover work at The Playboy Club.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Robert E. Lee's estate becomes a burial ground for Union soldiers, counterfeiters attempt to steal Abraham Lincoln's body, and an embalmed bandit makes his way around the country. Featuring Jason Ritter, Justin Long and Jimmy O. Yang.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Questlove, Method Man, Raven-Symone and more celebrate the early history of hip hop, the man known for inventing Motown, Berry Gordy, and "Star Trek" actress Nichelle Nichols's incredible activism on and off the TV screen.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: An Italian handyman steals the "Mona Lisa," the "Santa bandits" rob a bank in Texas, and Mossad agents capture a Nazi general in Argentina. Featuring Jack Black, Johnny Knoxville, Tony Hale, "Weird Al" Yankovic and Rachel Bloom.

programme.title: Drunk History
programme.desc: Joan of Arc leads the French during the Hundred Years' War, Mongol leader Genghis Khan rises to power, and Mansa Musa leads a pilgrimage to Mecca. Featuring Vanessa Hudgens, Randall Park and Donald Faison.

programme.desc: Toni, Quintin, and his mom return to find out who fathered his son. This time they’ll wonder if Toni cheated! Jenny needs to know whether her husband Matt or his friend fathered her child! Finally, will Vivian end her 30-year search for her son?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Krista isn't sure if the father of her baby is her husband, her ex-boyfriend or her ex's nephew! Then, Latasha is mad because her sister told her man that she slept with 4 other men, and he may not be the father of her baby!

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Slept With 10 Men…I'm Not The Dad!
programme.desc: Zebarious and his new girlfriend want a DNA test to prove he didn’t father Rhonda’s child. But Rhonda doesn’t think so! Later, Mary says her son’s fiancée is a cheater because she hit on her!

programme.title: The Maury Show: My Wife Had a Threesome. Who's the Dad?
programme.desc: Toni’s fiancée is a tattoo artist and wants to know if he’s been making his mark in bed with other women. Is Sandy’s fiancé cheating with married women? Is Juanita's fiancé a cheater?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 5 Men Tested … Are Any of Them My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Teshinya suspects that Clarence is picking up women at church and went undercover to get proof! Desirae is 17 and 5 months pregnant, but thinks her boyfriend Chris is cheating with her friend!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Is Cortney the father of Brittany’s kids? According to his sister, Brittany cheated with her fiancé Clifton! Later, Melissa claims that her ex-husband didn’t father her twins and Sean’s the dad! Will the DNA results confirm this?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Terrazina’s own brother Tyson thinks that Simon is not the father. Will Tyson prove she cheated and that Simon is not the father of her daughter? Then, William is in a heated debate with two women over the paternity of their children!

programme.title: The Maury Show: 4 Women … 4 Babies … Is He the Father?
programme.desc: It's more of the paternity pandemonium that you crave! You’ll see denying dads, mad moms and some of the most shocking results we’ve ever seen! Don’t miss one second of the drama on today’s MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Eddie’s mom Grace won’t let them live with her unless Kay Kay can prove that her son Eddie fathered her grandchild. Then, Troy denies that he’s the father of all 5 of Vanessa’s babies. But when the results arrive, will he be proven wrong or right?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: The wait is over, today on MAURY! The shocking results from some of yesterday’s paternity cliff-hangers are finally revealed. Also, all new couples are here hoping and praying that the results provide the answers they want!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Wild Results ... Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Sherry has a shocking sex secret to tell her man involving his childhood best friend. Then, Jen's got proof of her hubby cheating! Will these relationships survive?

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Did Tiffany’s fiancé Deon get her lesbian best friend pregnant? Then, William believes that his 2 of his 6 kids with ex-wife Nicole aren’t his and could be the father of another’s woman’s kid! Our DNA tests reveal the truth!

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Dorothy Donovan fue asesinada en su casa de Dover, Delaware. Cuando su hijo declaró que fue asesinada por un polizón que la había recogido, la policía se mostró escéptica.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación de un saco de dormir desechado, que contiene zapatillas de deporte ensangrentadas y un bolso, lleva a la policía al cuerpo de una mujer joven.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2001, Ginger Hayes y su pequeño hijo fueron secuestrados durante un robo de auto. El crimen había sido reportado por un testigo a los pocos minutos de ocurrir.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, Julie Estes fue secuestrada de una tienda de conveniencia en Southside donde trabajaba. Su cuerpo fue encontrado al día siguiente, pero el asesinato quedó sin resolver hasta el 2003.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Vestido para Matar
programme.desc: Se sospecha del padre de una niña cuando ella es asesinada, pero años después la policía se entera que un asesino condenado vivía cerca. Pequeñas gotas de sangre ayudan a la policía a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de inspeccionar el daño de una tormenta en un hogar en Tampa, un asesor de seguros simplemente desapareció. Treinta horas después, su cuerpo apareció en un río cercano. Pero el asesino había sido descuidado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, 121 personas en Dakota del Sur y Minnesota sufrieron una misteriosa enfermedad. Solo había habido un brote como ese, y cuando sucedió entonces, nadie pudo entender por qué.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1989, April Loveless, de 4 años, fue encontrada muerta en el patio trasero de su casa en Texas. Sus padres le dijeron a la policía que fue atacada y asesinada por perros salvajes. Los investigadores no estuvieron de acuerdo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encuentra a Nancy Newman y a sus dos hijas que fueron brutalmente asesinadas. La escena del crimen no tiene escasez de pruebas, pero los investigadores no pueden encontrar un vínculo concluyente con su principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Lori Auker, de 19 años, salió de su casa de Pennsylvania para ir a trabajar y nunca llegó, se necesitó de la tecnología de la era espacial, pelos de gato e insectos para identificar al secuestrador de la mujer.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, un cráneo humano recuperado de un estanque de Ohio revela un crimen espantoso. Las marcas en el cráneo indican que la víctima había sido apuñalada varias veces y que los dientes se le habían extraído con unos alicates de punta delgada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cirujano es apuñalado hasta la muerte y el sospechoso más probable es visto en un restaurante al momento del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la casa de un policía se incendia, los expertos sospechan de un incendio provocado. El oficial cuya casa fue incendiada arresta al narcotraficante de bajo nivel James Wren, quien confiesa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Aunque su hija ha escapado antes, ella siempre ha regresado. Sus padres estaban seguros de que esta vez no sería diferente, pero estaban equivocados.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un caso inusual involucrando la violación y muerte de Nancy DePriest en 1988. Después de que Chris Ochoa confesara, el caso fue cerrado. 8 años después, Achim Marino confesó al mismo crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un misterioso accidente informático llevó a una próspera empresa de fabricación al borde del colapso, poniendo en peligro cientos de puestos de trabajo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 15 de Octubre de 1985, dos explosiones de bombas sacudieron a Salt Lake City y resultaron en dos muertes. Una tercera explosión ocurrió al día siguiente; esta vez, la víctima sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, la joven madre, Tammy Tatum, fue encontrada agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su departamento de Longmont, Colorado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Ryan Stallings, de cuatro meses, muere en circunstancias sospechosas, su madre finalmente es condenada por su asesinato. Pero meses después, surgen nuevas pruebas de una fuente sorprendente – su hermano recién nacido.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio, un asesinato de una década de una joven ama de casa de Texas es investigado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: No había una razón clara para que un joven y saludable estudiante universitario estuviera muerto. Pero cuando el forense descubrió una pequeña pista durante la autopsia, los investigadores pudieron descubrir un misterio lleno de traición y venganza.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 11 años desapareció de un pequeño pueblo en un área remota de Alaska, los investigadores se preguntaron si había sido atacada por un oso o se había perdido en los densos bosques.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pareja perfecta
programme.desc: Una examinación de la primera vez que se utilizó ADN animal para resolver un caso penal

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la universitaria Jenna Verhaalen fue encontrada muerta en su departamento de Bryan, Texas y las hemorragias petequiales en sus ojos indicaron que fue estrangulada.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Griselda impide que el secuaz de Fernando remate a Antonio en el hospital. Reinaldo rechaza a Teresa Cristina y ella se va a buscar a José. Griselda teme ahora por Kikito y contrata un guardaespaldas. Beatriz amenaza a Esther con quitarle a Victoria.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Reinaldo y Teresa Cristina discuten y ella amenaza con matarlo. Reinaldo se presenta en la comisaría para presentar una denuncia. Gabriel le cuenta a Juan Pablo lo que pasa con Esther y su hija. José le dice a Teresa Cristina que perdió el deseo por ella.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa descubre al farsante de Víctor, pero Lalo quiere que le dé una segunda oportunidad. Catalina y Estanislao se enfrentan. Sara se sale con la suya, pero desconoce que Marisa podría regresar a trabajar al hotel. Marcela llega a Nueva York.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal trata de pasar su despecho con Sara, mientras Marisa constata en el hotel que su excuñada se trae algo con su rival. A ella le ofrecen una beca por Lalo, pero la rechaza. Su hijo se las ingenia para conseguirle trabajo a su padre.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Lalo intercede por su familia y le pide a Cristóbal firmar un pacto de caballeros. Marisa regresa a su trabajo. Ty le propone a Cristóbal que lo acompañe en su campaña y quiere arrancar en la cueva del lobo: Queens, el barrio de la cenicienta.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa se tropieza con Catalina en el hotel, la periodista ya no quiere seguir las manipulaciones de Sara. Cristóbal le cumple a Lalo y Víctor consigue empleo. Calixta pierde su baúl de los recuerdos, teme que se lo haya llevado Estanislao.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia protege a Hayde en el pueblo, mientras a Perfecta la perturban las dudas, toma determinaciones. Sebastián defiende a su hermana, cuando la honestidad de Laurentino pende de un hilo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia espera la confirmación del encuentro con sus hijos, mientras la tensión entre Perfecta y su hija puede darle un giro a la vida de Hayde. Todos comentan una noticia en el pueblo.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Perfecta quiere evitar el encuentro de sus nietos con su madre, hace un acuerdo con la profesora Judit, pero se llevan una sorpresa. Alicia recibe una declaración y Justino la hace reflexionar.

programme.title: La viuda de blanco
programme.desc: Alicia disfruta de la compañía de sus hijos, aunque le hacen preguntas que ella debe contestar. Sebastián y ella tienen un enfrentamiento que trae consecuencias que pueden ser graves.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Alba le cuenta la verdad a Esther sobre los padres de Victoria. Teresa Cristina ordena la ejecución de Antonio y le exige a Fernando pruebas de su muerte. Griselda tiene un mal presentimiento y Patricia recibe una llamada que la deja en shock.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler
programme.desc: Antonio sobrevive y Griselda se lo comunica a Teresa Cristina, advirtiéndole que la hundirá en la cárcel. Beatriz acosa a Esther. Reinaldo ve el cartel de la presunta rubia asesina. Teresa Cristina quiere que Fernando termine el trabajo con Antonio.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants stand in front of a long table with 13 holes. Contestant enters a cylindrical glass tank filled with water and then dead frozen mice are dumped in. The contestant will be standing on a large plexiglass platform in the air.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Joe Rogan, in a crowd of fans, counts down the top 15 stunts from all the shows up till this point.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants hold onto monkey bars, suspended under a helicopter. In a Plexiglas coffin and covered with leeches. Contestants search for rubber boots at the bottom of a tank of cut up fish parts. Contestants must run their motorcycles off of a cliff.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start on the roof of The Mandalay Bay. A tank is filled with Piranha and pig kidneys, which will need to be picked up off using their mouth. The contestants are allowed to eat up to six cave spiders.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Taxi cabs will each be suspended from their own crane. Player is placed inside a sealed Plexiglas coffin with thousands of roaches. The contestants will be hung by their ankles from a crane and suspended over a swimming pool.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant seated in the helicopter will "go" they crawl out and under the helicopter. Players transfer cow hooves out of a tank of Cod Liver Oil and into a tank of Maggots. Contestant must drive their car at approx. 25mph towards another car.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start this game floating in the water. Contestants compress a cows eye with their mouth, squeezing the juice out of the eye into a glass. Contestant will stand on Euclid dump trucks as they travel down the road.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Players are placed into a large plexiglas coffin with several thousand snakes. Eight glass torch-goblets are placed on stone pillars of varying heights. Contestants will bob in a tank filled with cow eyes to recover pig hearts.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant must dive into the water and swim down to a city bus. On a table, there are dishes of roaches. Players are given fifty cow brains with a FF chip hidden inside. Contestants must make the way across a maze of beams.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant is placed in a specially designed clear bag. A tank is filled with millipedes, roaches and worms. Contestant is standing on one of four 8-foot tall 16-foot long Plexiglas walls suspended high above the ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestant will be riding in the back of a truck driving down a pier. Players will have to clear tables to uncover a three-digit combination written on the glass top of each of the tables. Contestant must drive their car under a semi truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: There will be a boat that is towing three rafts. A Plexiglas bottom covered in pig parts. The child stands under a large metal shower-head and pulls a chain. Suspended above the water. The kid must climb through the tubes and traverse.
