programme.desc: A Bruce Lee Classic! Lee plays Chen Zhen, a student of Huo Yuanjia, who fights to defend the honor of the Chinese in the face of foreign aggression, and to bring to justice those responsible for his master's death.

programme.title: Legend of the Fist: The Return of Chen Zhen
programme.desc: Incredible martial arts sequences mark this thriller about a legendary fighter who takes on ruthless outside oppressors in World War II-era Shanghai.

programme.title: Ip Man
programme.desc: Ip Man is the award-winning film adaptation about the life story of Ip Man, the grandmaster of the Wing Chun style of kung fu and sifu of legendary martial arts superstar, Bruce Lee.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Newly arrived in Hong Kong, martial arts instructor Ip Man encounters stiff opposition when he begins teaching the Wing Chun fighting style. But instead of bowing to his rivals' demands, he perseveres and retaliates with amazing speed and power.

programme.title: Ip Man 3
programme.desc: In this explosive third installment of the blockbuster martial arts series, when a band of brutal gangsters led by crooked property developer (Mike Tyson) make a play to take over the city, Master Ip is forced to take a stand.

programme.title: Double Impact
programme.desc: Identical twins are separated at six months and raised on different continents. They reunite twenty-five years later to avenge the murder of their parents and reclaim their stolen family fortune.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: Danielle organiza una boda a finales de verano de su manera favorita: estilo campestre con arreglos rústicos de flores silvestres en los pasillos y un festín de productos locales frescos de los campos para que el día sea un evento mágico.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: Se trata de chuparse los dedos lentamente, cocinando las bondades caseras mientras Danielle organiza un evento de barbacoa en Texas en el granero adornado con parafernalia de vaqueros y flores de campo.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: South Pond entra a probar una tarta de mantequilla en el mercado de agricultores y celebra su primer evento de degustación de cerveza, elaborando cinco deliciosos aperitivos del tamaño de un bocado para degustar junto con cervezas locales.

programme.title: Taste Of The Country
programme.desc: South Pond está agotado para su evento más grande de la temporada: una cena temática inspirada en los viajes de Danielle a las costas del sur de Italia y las hierbas y verduras frescas en su propio patio trasero.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: En tan solo 30 minutos, el chef Spencer Watts prepara una deliciosa comida libanesa para cuatro personas.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: El chef Spencer Watts prepara una comida india rápida para cuatro personas en unos 30 minutos, por unos 30 dólares.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¡Si tienes 30 minutos, entonces tienes tiempo para hacer una comida china rápida para cuatro personas! El chef Spencer Watts hará una fiesta por 30 dólares.

programme.title: Media hora y listo!
programme.desc: ¿A quién no le gusta cenar pizza? El chef Spencer Watts elabora una pizza rápida y sencilla con una ensalada de albahaca fresca.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ubicado en Bellmore, Nueva York, The Mixing Bowl enfrenta una afluencia de competencia y apenas tiene clientes.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay debe trabajar con un chef testarudo y propietarios sin experiencia para realizar algunos cambios y traer de vuelta a los clientes a Seascape.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay se dirige a Fair Lawn, Nueva Jersey, para encontrarse con un personal de meseros indiferentes que lastima al restaurante italiano Campania's.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Peter's, un restaurante italiano familiar en Babylon, Nueva York. Descubre que el restaurante se está hundiendo debido a su descarado gerente y copropietario.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: Todo un chef
programme.desc: La cocina es el corazón de cada hogar y queremos que lo pongas a latir con las mejores recetas, que compartas en familia y te luzcas como #TodoUnChef.

programme.title: Lo que comemos las mujeres
programme.desc: El mole se prepara de diferentes formas, pero aquí ponen a prueba a Karla para ver si es digna de casarse.

programme.title: Lo que comemos las mujeres
programme.desc: Los insectos también son un alimento nutritivo, las tantarrias están en el campo, las cazaremos y nos las comeremos.

programme.title: Lo que comemos las mujeres
programme.desc: La fe mueve montañas, pero esta procesión trata de compartir alimentos en la cima de la montaña para dar gracias.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, Eileen and Derrick Severs disappear from their home in a small village in Great Britain and police find evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young man was killed in a mysterious car crash, but the evidence at the scene led investigators to believe it was not an accident. Forensic science revealed what really happened and the truth devastated three families.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A drive-by shooting leaves one man dead and another seriously wounded. Cell phone calls and shell casings point to a suspect, but authorities are unable to place him at the crime scene. A forensic geologist proves that dirt is anything but dumb.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search when the mother of two young children went missing. Twenty years after her body was found, new technology recontextualized old evidence and pointed directly to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Edward Honaker was convicted of rape, sodomy and aggravated sexual battery and sentenced to three life terms in prison. He maintained his innocence. After years in prison and writing countless letters, he finally found someone who believed him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For six years, a serial killer prowled the streets of New York City. He wrote letters to police and The New York Post, indicating he would kill twelve people — one for each astrological sign.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Susan Fassett was gunned down as she left her church choir practice in Poughkeepsie, NY. After clearing her husband, police turned their attention to Fred Andros, with whom Susan had an affair.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Fire engulfs the home where Lori Keidel and her siblings were left alone while their father went to the laundromat. Years after her mother's disappearance, Lori tells police she witnessed her mother's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others. But when they discover blood spatter in her boyfriend's bedroom, they know this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This episode documents a deadly bombing at a church in Oakwood, Illinois, in December 1997.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, Brian and Beverly Mauck were found dead in their Graham, Washington home. Using a bloody palm print and shoe prints at the scene, investigators focus their attention on Daniel Tavares, who had previously inked a tattoo on Brian's back.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bomb explosions rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day; this time, the victim survived.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was well liked and successful, which made the brutality of the crime even harder to understand.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The bodies of several women are found on a remote hill in California. The police get a break when a prostitute escapes and is able to identify her attacker and his automobile.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Scott Dunn goes missing, police spray his bedroom with Luminol and uncover a scene of horrific violence. Now investigators face a daunting task: proving that Scott Dunn had been murdered without a body, a witness or a murder weapon.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a talented television news anchor is shot to death outside her home, it appears to be a crime of passion perpetrated by an obsessed fan.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: On September 17, 1984, in a suburb of Tucson, Arizona, eight-year-old Vicki Hoskins left home on her pink bicycle to mail a letter for her mother. She never returned, but her slightly damaged bicycle was found nearby.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: While skeet shooting on a beautiful spring day, Martin Dillon is shot dead. His friend maintains it was a freak accident, but it takes more than 20 years for the truth to surface.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: In 1996, police received a call from Darlie Routier telling them of her two sons' murders. The police found the killer by analyzing blood spatter, doing behavioral profiling and analyzing Darlie's 911 call.

programme.title: Forensic Files (embed)
programme.desc: When Joann Katrinak is found dead in a corn field with her infant son, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue which uncovers a twisted story of passion gone wrong.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: The Rangers nearly reach their breaking point when both Gruumm and Broodwing send robot after robot to attack the city.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Convinced that the Rangers no longer need her, Kat takes a top-level position at SPD Headquarters.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Bridge is captured and the other Rangers must use all their skills to find him before he is destroyed.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Broodwing brings the Dino Rangers from the past to fight on the side of evil.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Gruumm takes The Terror to the past in an attempt to defeat Earth before SPD was formed.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Jack and Sky embark on a dangerous mission to stop an incoming meteor from destroying Earth.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Cruger's old rival teams up with Broodwing to take down the Rangers one by one.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: The teens grapple with failure after Cruger hails the A squad.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Jack needs to decide what he really wants to do with his life and the Rangers are dealt a shocking revelation.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: With Cruger captured, the A Squad is sent by Gruumm to finish off the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Space Patrol Delta
programme.desc: Omni descends to Earth and Gruumm makes his last stand against the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: A spell has been broken and evil is emerging to destroy the Earth. The sorceress Udonna needs to find 5 teens from Briarwood to take on the powers of the warriors of the past to fight the evil.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Xander, Vida, Chip, and Madison finally tap into their Mystic Force powers, but without a Red Ranger, Udonna and Clare know they are in trouble.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Chip and Vida think they can learn more spell codes by doing community service, but learn that real heroes are born in the face of danger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Nick thinks Madison is too shy. When she gets turned to stone, Nick finds out he's wrong.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: The others think Nick stole some money. Nick hears voices in his head and finds out its Koragg. Koragg battles the Rangers and steals their Megazord power.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: While in battle, Nick is whisked away with Catastros to another dimension. He must face his fears of Catastros. In the end he ends up combining with Catastros to defeat the monster.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Xander thinks he knows how to be a leader. When it comes to getting the Fire Heart before Necrolai, Xander has to follow in order to lead.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: A new DJ, DJ Fly, comes to town. Chip finds out that DJ Fly is really turning the teens of Briarwood into vampires, including Vida. After destroying the Fly Trap Monster, the teens turn back to normal. All except Vida who still remains a vampire.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Fly Trap has been destroyed, but Vida is still a vampire. The Rangers find out that Necrolai is the vampire who bit Vida. Chip is determined to save her from being a vampire.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Xander has a big zit. He thinks he can get rid of it by using a perfection potion. Instead Xander starts turning into a tree. Vida has to help Xander and then the Rangers have to protect and figure out the secret of the Fire Heart.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Clare takes on the legacy of her mother as the Gatekeeper. Koragg captures Udonna. Necrolai is about to destroy the Rangers. Clare steps forward and the forces of evil use her to raise the gate.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: The gates have been raised and Morticon is set free. Nick goes to save Clare while the others hold off Morticon. Clare uses the rest of her powers to lower the gates. The Rangers destroy Morticon with the help of the White Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Necrolai gets the Rangers to break the force field of a magical cave. Inside the cave is a magical lamp and a petrified mummy. Jenji is found inside the lamp. Imperious is brought to life by Octomus.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Imperious turns into Calindor and tries to persuade Udonna into believing he can help the Mystic Force. The Rangers are busy trying to fight Jester.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Daggeron teaches Xander that without practice, he can cause harm to the rest of the Rangers. Daggeron sends the teens to Shalifar to help Xander see the meaning of inner strength.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Koragg decides it's time to fight Solaris Knight. Gnatu steals life force from civilians when the Rangers come to stop him.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Jenji gets jealous of Fire Heart. He takes Fire Heart to live in the forest. When he goes back to find him, Fire Heart is gone. In the end, Jenji sees how selfish he was.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: The Rangers get lazy and use their magic for everything. When fighting becomes too tiring for them, the Rangers want to use Jenji. Evil captures Jenji and wishes there were never any Power Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Mystic Force
programme.desc: Imperious has wished the Power Rangers away. The world has lost its color and evil now rules. The Tribunal of Magic is the only entity that can reverse the wish. The teens go to the Tribunal of Magic and their request is denied.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos equipos se enfrentan en un desafío de preparación de alimentos que recompensa a los ganadores por la oportunidad de pasar tiempo con el Chef Ramsay fuera de la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay ordena a los concursantes restantes que preparen el desayuno para los miembros del servicio visitantes. El equipo ganador tendrá tiempo libre y los perdedores tendrán el rol de patrullar la cocina.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el cuarto día, los Chefs restantes compiten en una prueba de degustación con los ojos vendados. Los perdedores deben aceptar un castigo difícil mientras los ganadores cenan con el Chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Para avanzar en este desafío, los siete Chefs restantes deben comprar y preparar la comida para la recepción de una boda.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Melissa se une a los hombres en una competencia para ver qué equipo puede preparar los mejores platos de langosta. Pero hay un problema: los equipos deben matar primero a sus crustáceos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis concursantes restantes deben preparar aperitivos y platos principales con las sobras, por lo que ambos equipos deben crear sus propios menús de cena.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay consolida a los cinco concursantes restantes en un equipo, pero primero deben competir entre sí para impresionar a 100 estudiantes de secundaria.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los tres Chefs restantes preparan versiones gourmet de platos estadounidenses clásicos para jueces externos: sus madres, que no saben qué platos están probando.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los dos últimos competidores se enfrentan a un desafío final que implica algo más que cocinar: deben diseñar y administrar sus propios restaurantes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En el final de temporada, los ánimos se enfurecen cuando los dos concursantes preparan un último servicio de cena para el chef Ramsay.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Gordon Ramsay regresa para una cuarta temporada de torturas culinarias. Quince Chefs competirán por la oportunidad de trabajar en el propio restaurante de Ramsay en Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El primer desafío de la temporada encuentra a los concursantes cortando a un rodaballo en finos filetes de 180 gramos. Un miembro de cada equipo debe actuar como camarero durante el servicio de comidas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Después de que las gallinas los despiertan en sus habitaciones, los concursantes deben cocinar para la cena familiar lo que al principio les cantó.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: The crew finds a couple of California homeowners with an enormous kitchen that only has its size going for it; its problems include exposed plywood and dated cabinets.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A cramped kitchen is revamped by partially knocking down the wall into the dining room and accenting the room with an arch and distressed corbels.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Beachy wall tiles, a mix of butcher block and stone countertops, a swinging chair and a faux green wall finish off a rebuilt kitchen.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A bland and boring backyard is completely transformed into the ultimate outdoor kitchen; a live edge dining table becomes the focal point.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: An urban backyard is overhauled with composite gray decking cut in a unique pattern, a built-in bench with planters and stone bases, and Garapa wood mounted horizontally to a wall to enclose the space.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Custom pizza oven built into a fireplace; new floors, cabinets, countertops, paint and lighting; custom welded bar table, dining table and stained wood bar wall.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A grimy outdated kitchen with pink tile, tired cabinets and worn appliances is blown up into an elegant farmhouse kitchen in three short days.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison has a big project on her hands as she flips an ancient kitchen into a modern masterpiece by re-vamping the floor plan, eliminating a window, opening up the doorway to a small nook and doubling the size of the main entrance.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew find a couple of homeowners with a huge kitchen that has become almost unusable; a new layout, flooring, cabinets, countertops and appliances.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: An outdoor kitchen that screams lets have a party, complete with its own kegorator.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Alison and the crew install an outdoor kitchen, beginning with the addition of new pavers, outdoor cabinetry, a shade structure, an outdoor television, a swinging day bed, a wine bar and beer tap, and desert-friendly plants.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A large, dimly lit kitchen feels like a cave; Alison transforms the kitchen into a two-toned open kitchen that looks spacious.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: An old kitchen is updated with a retro atomic vibe using high gloss white cabinets, a vintage diamond backsplash in green and gold, a retro kidney-shaped table, and shelving from chrome pipes.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A worn-out kitchen from the 60's is updated into a mid-century modern space using a custom banquette area, nesting suitcase tables, and a unique gold record stool.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew tackle an outdoor kitchen with marine grade cabinets, stone countertops, outdoor appliances and freshly painted furniture.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison creates a modern-looking kitchen with stainless-steel and glass cabinets, gray countertops, a white kitchen island, a custom-built wine rack, and a bar cart made from industrial pipes.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison draws inspiration from nature with an earth-tone palette, a mosaic-stone backsplash, granite countertops, a waterfall island, and hardwood floors; Alison also builds a dog food bin from reclaimed hardwood and adds a tree design to a wall.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew renovate a large kitchen with hand-scraped flooring and dark wood cabinets; Alison and the homeowners team up to create custom elements such as a kitchen island, a banquet bench with a waterfall edge, and wine storage.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: A kitchen that hasn't been touched since the 1960s gets transformed into a family-friendly space with turquoise cabinets, a white backsplash, retro appliances, and cork flooring.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison designs an Italian-style kitchen with rustic features, including a faux beam, espresso-colored cabinets, marbled countertops, textured flooring, and a one-of-a-kind pendant light.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison transforms Porsha's builder-grade kitchen into a stylish space with an old-world, Moroccan vibe; Alison brings down a wall to open up the kitchen, then designs a mosaic table and built-in banquette to fill an under-utilized space.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew tackle a small kitchen, transforming it into a sleek, stylish space with accents more commonly seen in big-city lofts.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison renovates Fred and Dani's kitchen which has mismatched appliances, dated cabinets and fluorescent lights; she makes it mesh with the rest of their Spanish-style home, removes the cabinetry and opens it up to allow for an island with stools.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: In John and Kerry's kitchen, Alison closes off several windows and expands into the butler's pantry to create space.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison's crew builds a black walnut table for the dining area in the Blog Cabin kitchen; they build stools for the breakfast bar; finishes include dual-colored cabinetry with under-cabinet lighting, stainless steel appliances and a chef's pantry.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison incorporates triple-stacked cabinets in a kitchen with no space to spare.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison renovates a kitchen with no sense of flow, starting with the donation of its cabinets and the demolition of two short walls; in addition to a new kitchen island and countertops, Alison creates a small mud cubby and a doggy feeding station.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Tara and Joe love to serve brunch, and they admire the kitchens they see in catalogs; Alison Victoria gives the couple an island perfect for laying out a brunch spread, a built-in banquette, a double oven, floor-to-ceiling cabinetry, and wood floors.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew transform a drab backyard into a multilevel entertaining space; they add a kitchen complete with outdoor cabinets, concrete countertops and appliances; Alison helps the homeowners create custom elements such as concrete planters.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison designs a new layout for a choppy kitchen and adds navy and white cabinetry, a butcher-block island top, a muted metallic backsplash, and stainless-steel appliances.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the crew install new floors, cabinets, countertops, lighting, a picture window, and an orange island in a couple's Chicago kitchen; custom touches include barstools, dimensional shelves and a map-wall treatment.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Toni and Jason are in desperate need of a functional kitchen that fits Jason; Alison changes the kitchen's layout, breaking into a guest bedroom closet to make space for a built-in pantry and closing up a window to add wall space for cabinetry.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: Alison and the gang remove some walls to create a gigantic kitchen space, adding new floors, cabinets, countertops, and a rolling bar cart.

programme.title: Kitchen Crashers
programme.desc: After a difficult demolition, Alison and the crew install cabinets, countertops and appliances with mid-century modern style; they also add custom floating shelves and a wine rack made from PVC pipes.

programme.desc: Only a month after a woman moves in with her boyfriend, she allegedly discovers he's cheating on her and doing drugs.; A phone for the financially-strapped is allegedly stolen while two friends are eating donuts; the suspected thief denies being resentful

programme.title: Hot Bench

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The town of Westport has commissioned a statue of a Minuteman to commemorate the Revolutionary War. The whole town is involved, from Fred who will serve as town crier to Ricky who will make the dedication speech.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: To celebrate the Mertzes' wedding anniversary, Fred and Ricky want to go to a prizefight, but the girls want to get dressed up and go to a nightclub. An argument ensues and Lucy threatens to find two other escorts if their husbands won't take them.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides Ricky's love is growing cold so she takes Ethel's advice she learned from a book, How to Keep the Honeymoon from Ending. Her attempt to dress up for breakfast doesn't yield any response from Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: One of the girls in Ricky's show quits, creating a vacancy which Lucy wants to fill. She goes down for an audition and can have the part provided she loses twelve ponds in four days to fit into the previous singer's size 12 outfit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is reading "The Mockingbird Murder Mystery" when Ethel reads her fortune and tells her death is near. Later she overhears a conversation between Ricky and his agent and she jumps to the wrong conclusion that he's trying to do away with her.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky cuts off Lucy's allowance and charge accounts because of her careless spending, Lucy finds herself short of funds. Ethel has tickets to a radio quiz show that has a cash prize of $1,000.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Network television scouts are going to check out Ricky's band and Lucy tries to "get into the act" in order to be discovered as well. Of course Ricky will not hear of it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy becomes interested in numerology and advises Ricky that it is a good day for him to make any deals he can. However, she soon realizes that she consulted the horoscope from yesterday's newspaper.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: When Ricky leaves his clothes around the living room, Lucy gets angry and divides the room in half so Ricky can be as messy as he likes - on his side!

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky brings home a $3,500 mink coat to be used in his nightclub act, and Lucy assumes it's her anniversary present. Trying to get the coat away from her becomes a problem because Lucy not only wears it while she does housework, she even sleeps in it.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ethel Mertz interprets a gossip column item to mean that Ricky is interested in one of the chorus girls in his nightclub. Ricky assures Lucy that it's just publicity.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy opens a telegram addressed to Ricky from the War Department ordering him to appear at the Army's Fort Dix. This letter plus the drills Ricky and Fred have been practicing in the living room convince the women that their husbands have been drafted.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns that Ricky needs a dancer for his Parisian nightclub act and is determined to get the part. Fred offers to teach her how to dance but Ethel arranges instead to have the nephew of the woman who runs the French laundry to give pointers.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy buys a costly dress, and when Ricky tells her to take it back or pay for it herself, she decides to get a job. She answers an ad for a babysitter and finds herself in charge of high-spirited twin boys who are to appear in an amateur contest.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy's neighbor Miss Lewis has a crush on Mr. Ritter, the local grocer but istoo shy to invite him to dinner. Trying to play Cupid, Lucy invites him for her but he gets the idea that Lucy has fallen for him. Apparently Mr. Ritter is fond of Lucy as well.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: In a deception planned to convince Ricky that she ought to be in his new nightclub act, Lucy pretends to have a nervous breakdown. She consults a book on abnormal psychology that reveals three complexes she assumes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy decides to break into show business by writing a play about a Cuban tobacco picker and entering it in her women's club play competition. Of course she wants Ricky to star in it but he refuses.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ethel are eager to get a closer look at the belongings of the O'Briens, new neighbors in the building. They snoop around in their apartment while they are away and when they hear the O'Briens return, Lucy is trapped in the closet.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: A close inspection of her marriage license convinces Lucy that she and Ricky are not legally married. Because his name is misspelled on the certificate, Lucy insists Ricky go through the entire courtship and ultimately the marriage ceremony again.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: Breaking the Band
programme.desc: Aerosmith has truly earned its title as America's greatest rock 'n' roll band.

programme.title: Alice Cooper: Live at Montreux 2005
programme.desc: Known for his ability to merge exhilarating hard rock with darkly theatrical stage shows, Alice Cooper reaches new heights in this July 2005 performance at the Montreux Festival.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse - The Legacy
programme.desc: Amy Winehouse was one of the most discussed singer-songwriters of her generation.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse: A Final Goodbye
programme.desc: A Final Goodbye is an intimate look into the life and times of Amy Winehouse. This in-depth program chronicles her rise to pop superstardom and also offers a sensitive portrayal of a transformative star and the inner demons that inspired her work.

programme.title: Sex & Drugs & Rock & Roll
programme.desc: A portrait of British punk rock pioneer Ian Dury who was stricken with polio at a young age and defied expectations by becoming a founder of the punk-rock scene in Britain in the 1970s.

programme.title: Duran Duran Unstaged
programme.desc: Duran Duran Unstaged is a multimedia event that takes the audience on a cinematic journey with one of the most successful acts in the world during their performance at the Mayan Theater in Los Angeles. Directed by David Lynch.

programme.title: Beach Boys: Doin' It Again
programme.desc: To mark the group's 50th anniversary, Brian Wilson, Mike Love, Al Jardine, Bruce Johnston, and David Marks gathered in 2012 for an emotional reunion to record their first album of new material in 20 years and to kick off a worldwide tour.

programme.title: Becoming Queen
programme.desc: Led by the incomparable voice and showmanship of Freddie Mercury, Queen pioneered a unique brand of operatic rock that perfectly encapsulated the decadent excess of the 1970s. This documentary traces the history of the band.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Everlasting Words
programme.desc: These three brothers rose to the top of their profession. Writing all of their own hits, the harmonious family act became one of the world's best-selling artists of all time, selling over more than 220 million records worldwide.

programme.title: LiveNOW from FOX
programme.desc: A raw and unfiltered, non-stop stream of breaking news, live events and stories across the nation; limited commentary.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Robert gets a taste for the three suitors he has yet to connect with and has to decide which suitors are playing a game and which ones are playing for keeps.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: The suitors unmask their true selves to Robert and what they reveal could change everything. One of the suitors struggles to balance his relationship with Robert and his friendships in the house.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: The remaining guys are put to the test to see which of them truly knows Robert the best. Their patience is tested later when two suitors find themselves having to share Robert on a romantic date. A shocking elimination leaves the house rattled.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Robert introduces his family to the remaining men and gains perspective that leaves him questioning his relationships with some of the suitors. One man finds himself alienated by the others and Robert is inspired to share more about himself.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Robert and the final suitors head to a romantic destination where Robert will have to make his toughest decision yet. Robert is emotionally torn over his love for two men but the choice has to be made.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Lance Bass welcomes back Prince Charming and the 13 suitors that competed for his heart in a reunion special filled with drama, fun, heartbreak and never-before-seen-footage.

programme.title: Finding Prince Charming
programme.desc: Robert and his ten suitors set out for an active day at the beach and two lucky guys get chosen for the first solo dates with Robert. One suitor causes an uproar when he gets accused of behaving inappropriately in the house and word gets back to Robert.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: With Audra McDonald and Kate Upton as guest judges, the queens impersonate celebrities for the legendary Snatch Game, and Bianca Del Rio and Alex Trebek are special guests.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens pay tribute to one of the greatest stars of all time in 'Cher: The Unauthorized Rusical,' and Andrew Rannells and Billy Eichner guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Broad City stars Ilana Glazer and Abbi Jacobson guest judge as the queens are assigned parts in the new hit series 'Breastworld,' and Randy Rainbow and Stephen Colbert drop by.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The queens give today's hottest social media superstars drag makeovers, and '13 Reasons Why' star Miles Heizer and hip-hop artist Lizzo guest judge.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: Nine contestants must re-invent their glam drag looks using thrift store clothing and tchotchkes from the 99¢ store. Guest judge Bob Mackie stops by to help RuPaul weed out the drag queen with the least style. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Yandy hosts an event to raise money for Jonathan's nephew. Rich's investigation into Olivia's money dispute leads him to his old rival Cisco. Jim has a secret to reveal to Mama Jones about Chrissy. Kimbella and Yandy's beef comes to a violent clash.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Somaya attempts to mend Yandy and Kimbella's feud with the healing power of her spiritual tea. Joe and Cyn show up together to Erica's baby shower, sending Tahiry on a spiral. Safaree works on his new album. Remy faces her court date with Pap.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Erica's pregnancy is reaching full term but Safaree's new album threatens to pull him away. Jim shows Mama Jones her new house. PHresher has to settle his debt with Jada before Jenn finds out. Remy's legal fate is revealed.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Olivia meets with Cisco about her money dispute with Rich. Remy puts her new material to the test when she books a major performance. Jim records for Juelz's new album. Phresher buys an engagement ring. Joe and Cyn define their rekindled relationship

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop New York
programme.desc: Safaree risks missing the birth of his daughter. The Creep Squad's meeting about Olivia goes left. Jenn reconsiders her future with Phresher. Chrissy considers a new opportunity. Yandy prepares for Mendeecee's long awaited prison release.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Gunplay returns to Miami and vows to avoid temptation, Amara battles colorism as she hunts for a producer, Pretty Ricky's reunion is pretty rock and Bobby Lytes clashes with cousin Trina.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Joy wants closure with almost-ex-husband Trick, Pleasure P reconnects with a former flame, Amara's friends confront Young Hollywood, and Keyara doesn't want Gunplay working with Miami Tip.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Shay and Blue bury the hatchet, though Amara's unimpressed by Young Hollywood's 'apology,' Jojo's feuding parents derail her boutique opening, and Jeffrey rediscovers his love for Malik.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Bobby discovers Jeffrey's betrayal, Amara and Veronica fall out over Young Hollywood, Prince hosts a fashion show, and new friends Liz and Shay unite to deal with the meddlesome Gabby.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Amara celebrates her heritage with the help of a fellow Afro-Latina, Shay and P come to a crossroads in their relationship, and a love triangle leads to chaos at Prince's pool party.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Gunplay's demons resurface after a heartbreaking loss, Veronica calls out Jojo's pot-stirring ways, Malik faces his fears and comes out to Prince, and Jeffrey makes a decision about Bobby.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Shay's tentative reunion with Scrappy is short-lived, Joy is exasperated by Trick's pre-divorce celebration, Gunplay spirals downward, and Amara gets a career boost from a new friend.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Jojo is caught in the middle of her parents' contentious divorce, an athletic odyssey gives Veronica a new outlook on life, and Pleasure P feels betrayed by Blue and Shay's new partnership.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop Miami
programme.desc: Bobby debuts his new single and reignites his conflict with cousin Trina, Malik is offended by Prince's revenge prank on Michelle, and Blue tries to orchestrate Shay and Scrappy's reunion.

programme.desc: Jim Jones confronts Somaya's manager Maurice for talking trash about Chrissy. Somaya finds comfort in the arms of her ex-boyfriend, rapper X. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: It's been a long time since Jigen, Goemon and Fujiko have heard from Lupin. Then one day, they each receive an invitation from Lupin for a reunion aboard the luxury liner Sirloin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An international soccer game is taking place in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil and Lupin has his eyes on the box office and betting takes. Will the box office heist go as planned?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: An old man who supposedly knows the secret to Hitler's legacy lives in East Germany within the Berlin Wall. Lupin and his gang track the old man down, but the old man can't recall anything about any legacy.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: At Loch Ness in Scotland, the mysterious monster Nessie reveals itself from the lake, charmed by Fujiko's singing. Seeing this, Doctor Oz decides to use Fujiko to capture Nessie for his personal gain.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Fujiko and a mystery man have an enticing job for Lupin: Stealing a ton of gold bullion from a Swiss Bank, a bank renowned for its tight security. Can it be done? What is the mystery man's true identity?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A man is threatening to destroy the Leaning Tower of Pisa with a device that generates artificial earthquakes. The Italian government has no choice but to meet the culprit's, but Lupin takes the ransom for himself!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin has stolen the golden death mask of Tutankhamen, the ancient Egyptian pharaoh known as the "boy king." However, when Lupin tries on the golden death mask he becomes possessed by an ominous curse.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Trans Europe Superexpress train has departed Venice and is headed to France. Onboard the Superexpress is crime boss Don Marcino's ill-gotten treasures. Can Lupin and his gang pull off the heist before the train reaches its destination?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin meets the grandson of master Ukiyoe artist, Toushusai Sharaku and learns that he has been switching his own works with his grandfather's originals. Unable to switch the last painting due to illness, he asks Lupin to switch it in his stead.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Fujiko have been invited to a party hosted by Marcel Dulane, a member of Paris' high society. However, the elegant party turns out to be a trap. Fujiko is taken hostage and Lupin, with a time-bomb belt strapped to his waist…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is in Monaco to race his new toy in the Monaco Grand Prix. Or so he thought. Lupin ends up losing both his money and race car in a fixed poker game at the casino.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A rare bottle of Bordeaux, commissioned by Napoleon for his beloved wife, Josephine, is to be given to the President of the United States as a Christmas present.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A criminal gang has hidden a microfilm containing the manufacturing process for artificial diamonds, developed by NASA, in one of Inspector Zenigata's molars. Determined to get his hands on that microfilm, Lupin must capture Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Forward Hees, the world's richest man, suddenly dies a mysterious death and leaves a large ruby to Fujiko in his will. After inheriting the ruby, Fujiko comes down with the same mysterious fever as Hees…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A Count challenges Lupin to steal a gemstone named Dracula's Tear from on board his airship, the Hendenburg. However, also on board the ship are several formidable detectives: Homes III, Detective Archer, Koojisuke Kaneda and Inspector Zenigata.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin is suffering from Transformation Sickness, an illness that transforms him into a cruel, cold-blooded criminal at the stroke of midnight, and leaves him with no recollection of his murderous crime spree in the morning…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A small Arab nation has received a blackmail notice. Pay a $100 million or have their oil fields blown up. Lupin targets the money, but his plans are hindered when he finds out the culprits are using human bombs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The Black Panther, the world's largest emerald, gets its name from the black panther that appears inside it when a light shines on it at a particular angle. After capturing this one-of-a-kind emerald, Lupin hides it in a museum to retrieve it later…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Vault maker Marukin Safe Company is forced into bankruptcy after Lupin cracks open their impenetrable safes. To test his own skills, Marukin's son challenges Lupin to open a safe he has designed…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: While trying to snag General Hatler's prize medallion, which contains a fifty-carat ruby, Lupin inadvertently reels in Hatler's biggest secret, his toupee! An enraged General Hatler orders Lupin and his gang to be killed.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Upon returning to Japan, Goemon finds his master on the brink of death. Furthermore, Jinkuro, a fellow disciple, had stolen half of the scroll containing the Secret Arts of the Iga Ninja. Will Goemon be able to avenge his master?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Lupin and Jigen are in a remote area pursing a mysterious treasure, when they save a woman being chased by hoodlums. The woman invites the two back to her sister's manor, which is full of beautiful women…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: A mysterious woman who claims to be Fujiko's aunt, gives Lupin an ultimatum: Find Marshal Rommel's lost gold or die! First, Lupin must decipher the location of the gold, written in ancient hieroglyphs.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The great thief Nezumi-Kozou Jirokichi IV appears before Goemon and reveals that their ancestors competed in the first International Thieves Championship together, but were defeated by Lupin's grandfather, Arsène Lupin…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: The warden of an African prison is holding Fujiko captive. Lupin and his gang infiltrate the prison and attempt to break Fujiko out, but they become the target of the Iron Lizards, robotic devices developed to chase down fugitives!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: Linda, a beautiful dancer, has stolen Jigen's heart and a vengeful Meyer has taken Fujiko hostage. Believing the women they love are in danger and unaware that Linda and Meyer are working together, Lupin and Jigen are set up to kill each other…

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd, Part 2
programme.desc: According to legend, a stamp named the Cinderella Shadow is said to make its owner a princess. Lupin and his gang pull off the heist, but a girl name Alice who also wants the stamp tags along. Will the little girl get her royal wish?

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/08/1995 - With the Mariners down a run in the bottom of the 11th inning, Edgar Martinez doubled down the left-field line. The tying run scored from third and Ken Griffey Jr. raced all the way home from first to send Seattle to the ALCS.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Two powerhouses faced off with The Big Hurt challenging The Big Unit. On Opening Day in Seattle on March 31, 1996, Frank Thomas got the best of Randy Johnson with a line drive over the wall in right field for a home run.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: A decade removed from his days as a superstar pitcher in the mid-'80s, Dwight Gooden recaptured his swagger on one unforgettable night in the Bronx.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: Throwing a no-hitter at the hitter-friendly ballpark Coors Field seems like an unthinkable task. However, Hideo Nomo DID the unthinkable when he took the mound on September 17, 1996 and held the Rockies hitless to make history with the Dodgers.

programme.title: Great Games
programme.desc: 10/05/19 - Roberto Alomar put together a clutch performance for the Orioles in a series-clinching win against the Indians. Alomar tied the game with a two-out single in the 9th, then hit the go-ahead home run in the 12th to send Baltimore to the ALCS.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K 25th Anniversary
programme.desc: In part one of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the crew discuss the show's origins and the DIY feel of the early seasons.

programme.title: Backlot: MST3K
programme.desc: In part one of the complete history of MST3K, Joel and the rest of the crew discuss the show's origins and the DIY feel of the early seasons.

programme.title: MST3K: The Undead
programme.desc: A woman gets hypnotized back into her Dark Age'd past life while Tom takes a crack at being an observer.

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Monster: MST3K: Robot Monster
programme.desc: The guys watch a post-apocalyptic film about aliens and robots, riff on two more installments of "Radar Men from the Moon", and try to understand surrealism.

programme.title: MST3K: Robot Holocaust

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The church choir hits a sour note when parishioner Wally McDaniels, is accused of murder. McDanielsturns to fellow choir member Ben Matlock to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Amidst the beauty of a luxurious island mansion, a mystery game for charity quickly evolves into a puzzling murder when Matlock discovers the victim is really dead!

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A budding friendship between two great lawyers blossoms into animosity when Matlock and District Attorney Brennen square off on a murder trial. Not only does Matlock believe in his client’s innocence, he thinks Brennen might be the one who’s guilty!

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Thanks to Matlock, a struggling private investigator, played by guest star George Peppard, reunites with his long-lost daughter! Together they investigate a mysterious trail of clues to solve the toughest murder case of his career.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Family or not, Matlock regrets agreeing to hold a pre-wedding party for his bride-to-be goddaughter. Fights among the many freeloading guests have left his home in shambles and an old family feud has escalated into murder!

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When young attorney Samuel J. Haskins argues his case in court, it's clear he's copying the unusual style of his idol, Ben Matlock. This is flattering until Sam and his girlfriend get tangled up in a blackmail and murder scheme.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Why would anyone confess to a murder they didn’t commit? Ben’s trying to help his reporter friend beat a murder charge, but when she’s caught in a lie even Ben isn’t convinced she’s innocent.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When blackmail leads to murder, the evidence leads straight to Ben’s old reporter friend. With a client who’s not talking, even Ben is starting to have his doubts. While everyone thinks she is guilty, Ben must work hard to prove his friend’s innocence.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock takes the defense of a young attorney accused of murdering her boss, a man she was about to blow the whistle on for sexually harassing his female employees.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock goes head-to-head with a millionaire bent on revenge. Ben has to get inside the mind of a diabolical killer to avenge the death of his best friend.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A frame-up finds Matlock immersed in libel, scandal, and tales of alien spaceships! Delving into the lurid world of tabloid publishing, Matlock and his new investigator, Jerri Stone, sort through the world’s weirdest clues to solve a murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock suspects foul play when a college basketball coach is accused of pay-offs, point-shaving, and murder. As tempers flare and accusations run wild, Matlock makes an enlightening discovery, the head of the booster club was bribing recruits

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: The attraction is fatal! Matlock defends an obsessive suitor framed for allegedly murdering the love of his life, a dating service candidate so repelled by his presence that she had a restraining order to keep him away.

programme.title: Miradas sin filtro
programme.desc: Cada aventura conlleva un reto, Guanajuatito no es la excepción y la cultura otomí continúa asombrándonos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: La dinámica de las personas que viven bajo un mismo techo debe tener un equilibrio delicado. Mike y su novia, Lisa, mantienen una relación sana y, sin nada que les preocupe, se mudan juntos, pero no están solos en su nueva casa.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: El hogar debería ser un remanso de solaz, un refugio de los males externos. Pero ¿qué sucede cuando un terror paranormal lo invade, y el hogar se convierte en una prisión?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Algunas personas creen que los fantasmas son espíritus humanos que deben lidiar con asuntos aún pendientes y que quizás puedan necesitar la ayuda de los vivos con el fin de encontrar la paz entre los muertos.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los espiritistas algunas veces hablan sobre cierta región de la existencia donde los espíritus vagan libres de cuerpos materiales, y ellos la llaman “la otra vida”. En las costas de West Bay Lake, estado de Wisconsin.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la isla de Taiwán muchas personas creen que no existen fronteras entre el mundo material y el reino espiritual. Los fantasmas forman parte de la vida cotidiana.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Ayudar a los amigos a sobrellevar los tiempos difíciles puede ser agotador, en especial cuando esa dificultad tiene que ver con una enfermedad que pone en peligro la vida.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Cuando las personas inocentes se ven atacadas por entidades provenientes del reino sobrenatural, ponen su confianza en manos de investigadores paranormales para que estos los protejan de lo desconocido.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: ¿Qué tan diferente podría ser nuestra realidad si no pudiéramos sentir y comunicarnos de las formas más convencionales? Para Marie, este es un tema que forma parte de su día a día. Su hija Julie padece un problema mental que la debilita.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: En la inocencia de la infancia, el miedo es perfecto y no resulta influenciado por la racionalidad adulta, lo cual supone que se puede comprender a cabalidad el mundo que nos rodea.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los niños a menudo se encuentran a merced del mundo de los adultos y, algunas veces, se sienten incapaces de influir en el curso de sus propias existencias.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Los investigadores paranormales buscan comprender lo sobrenatural y, con frecuencia, utilizan su conocimiento para ayudar a los demás. Pero ¿qué ocurre con estos expertos cuando el objeto de sus estudios se pone contra ellos?

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Incluso los lugares más inofensivos pueden guardar las cicatrices de un pasado retorcido. El mal puede perdurar a través del tiempo, puede permanecer latente hasta que alguna persona ingenua o algún inocente se crucen en su camino sin darse cuenta.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Existen algunos lazos que no pueden romperse, tal como el vínculo que se establece entre una madre y su hija... o el vínculo psíquico entre un asesino y su víctima.

programme.title: Historias de ultratumba
programme.desc: Todos tenemos secretos. Algunos de nosotros les ocultamos cosas a nuestros amigos para evitar la vergüenza. Otros, se las ocultamos a nuestros seres queridos porque tenemos el temor de que estropeen la imagen que tienen de nosotros.

programme.title: Africa, la más salvaje.
programme.desc: El Zambeze es uno de los ríos más importantes de África, siendo un destructor y creador de algunas de las especies de vida silvestre más espectaculares de todo el continente.

programme.title: Iconos de vida silvestre
programme.desc: Este documental de la fauna silvestre inspecciona una típica sabana de Sudáfrica y la compleja red de vida que existe en su hábitat.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Enriquecidos por su experiencia, aquellos que transportan la ciudad de Nueva York revelan sus lugares favoritos, sabiduría, consejos y secretos a la ciudad del movimiento perpetuo que conocen tan bien.

programme.title: Descubriendo el mundo
programme.desc: Desde el Palacio Ducal hasta la Piazza San Marco y el carnaval, Venecia es famosa en todo el mundo. Sin embargo, son los canales los que hacen que Venecia sea tan especial.

programme.title: Sobrevivir en la naturaleza
programme.desc: La estrategia del predador tiene que ser mejor que la de su víctima para poder ganar el derecho de vivir un día más en la salvaje naturaleza.

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Los chicos intentan romper el récord local quedándose toda la noche en el cementerio. Un pollo embrujado no deja en paz a la familia.

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Los Casagrande encuentran un mapa del tesoro. Frida y Carlos hacen un elegante viaje en avión.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne debe elegir entre sus mejores amigos, Sid y Lincoln. Además, descubre que su padre está saliendo con su maestra.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y sus primos desarrollan un plan para que el robot de Sid haga todas las tareas domésticas. Los sueños de Carl quedan arruinados cuando conoce a El Halcón, y Bobby decide asumir el papel él mismo.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Laird está nervioso por la fiesta de películas que organizó en su casa, así que Ronnie Anne lo ayuda fingir que la casa de Arturo es suya. Carlota solo puede prestarle atención al teléfono.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Acostumbrado a ser el mejor, Carl no puede asimilar que Adelaide esté en la misma clase de karate y sea la estudiante estrella. Hector comienza a vender los deliciosos tacos de Rosa, pero se ve abrumado cuando son más populares que los del mercado.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Ronnie Anne y Sid sospechan que el nuevo vecino del edificio es, en realidad, La Tormenta, su luchador favorito. Un anciano gana el kart con el que Carl soñaba, pero él está dispuesto a demostrarle que lo merece más que nadie.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Carlitos se embarca en una aventura salvaje para ganar su animal de peluche favorito en un juego de arcade. Carl toma la chancla de Rosa.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Cuando el divertido papá de Frida llega de visita, Héctor intenta recuperar la atención de sus nietos. Ronnie Anne y Lincoln están listos para un día de bromas y Sid también quiere participar.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Después de que una recaudación de fondos para el zoológico sale mal, Sid debe salvar el día con su familia.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Los Casagrande preparan a Lalo para la audición en la que quiere ser elegido el nuevo compañero canino de Phoebe Powers. Con los adultos fuera, Bobby y Carlota se turnan para cuidar a los niños e ir a una fiesta.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Carl necesita obtener la aprobación de un grupo musical antes de que su nueva canción pueda sonar en la radio. Ronnie Anne y sus amigas luchan por el espacio del gimnasio jugando al balón prisionero.

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Después de ver los impresionantes movimientos de giro de CJ, Par ayuda a CJ a entrenar para una competencia. Cuando Adelaide pierde un diente, Carl y Bobby le enseñan sobre el Ratón, el hada de los dientes de América Latina.

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: Los Casagrande
programme.desc: Héctor finalmente se une al equipo de fútbol de sus sueños. Mientras preparan bao para la Feria Cultural China, Sid y Adelaide se enfrentan a bandidos que viejan en el tiempo.

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: Los Casagrande

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Justin está convencido de que su novia Lainie le ha sido infiel, y lo que es más importante, que no es el padre de su hijo. Pero sus propias inseguridades lo han vuelto violento. Además, Steven duda ser padre del hijo de Ashley.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Rebecca dejó a su bebé con su prometido James y su madre Adeline, y descubrió que su bebé estaba hospitalizado. Rebecca sospecha que James es el responsable. ¡Adeline la culpa de la muerte del bebé!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Pamela quiere pesar 40 libras. Samantha, que sufre de bulimia y alcoholismo, roba para consumir sus atracones. ¿Pueden las dos mujeres lidiar con sus desórdenes alimenticios con apoyo y tratamiento?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Tras sobrevivir a una loca persecución en coche, perder la pierna y estar en coma a causa de su esposo, Portia finalmente lo confrontará. No admitirá la culpa, pero hoy Steve está ayudando a Portia a hacerse oír.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Naomi, de 17 años, ha cambiado repentinamente de actitud y tiene la misión de ser madre. Sus padres, Leeanders y April, necesitan que Steve intervenga.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Jennifer se fue de casa para protegerse de su padrastro Allen. 15 años después, su madre quiere una segunda oportunidad, pero Jennifer tiene dudas. ¿Puede Steve ayudar a componer esta familia destruida?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lanikka está harta de los abusos de su novio Malcom. Después, los celos de Tim han destrozado su familia, pero ahora está desesperado por recuperarlos, ¿Tiffany lo dejará definitivamente?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Desde que Chris tenía 3 meses, su abuela Anne lo crió y le dijo que su madre Hollie era abusiva y que trató de lastimarlo. Ahora Chris y Hollie se van a conocer por primera vez en nuestro escenario.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: LaShawna y su novio James sabrán si su amiga Coral lastimó a su hijo hace años. También admitirá que ella le fue infiel con Coral. ¿Cómo reaccionará él cuando descubra otro bombazo?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Buddy pasa sus días fumando y jugando a los videojuegos, en lugar de mantener a su familia. Su novia Holly trabaja para mantenerlos a todos, incluyendo a su hijo que tiene necesidades especiales, ¡pero está harta!

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Lainie y Justin tienen un bebé de 9 meses juntos. Justin lastima a Lainie porque cree que ella es infiel. ¿Pero cómo reaccionará Steve cuando se enfrente a Justin?

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: ¿Quién es responsable del bienestar del pequeño Noel? Todo el mundo puede negar las acusaciones, pero alguien sabe qué pasó, y Steve va a obtener explicaciones.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Kendra tiene la misión de salvarla de su novio tóxico Chris. A los 17 años, Kendra está embarazada de su sexto hijo. Kendra lo ha intentado casi todo, incluso echarlo de su casa, pero no solamente se defendió, sino que también golpeó a Kendra.

programme.title: El show de Steve Wilkos
programme.desc: Sheroya tiene 17 años y se esfuerza por criar a 2 niños mientras sale de fiesta sin parar. Su novio Malcolm suele ser infiel y la maltrata verbalmente. Steve tiene mucho trabajo por delante con esta pareja, pero ¿alguno de ellos despertará?

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Mariana abofetea a Natalia como una advertencia de que no le diga a Ricky que él no es el hijo de Ernesto. Natalia la amenaza con que muy pronto ella se irá con Ricky.

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Willy lleva a Natalia a empujones para sacarle la verdad. Ella intenta decirle la verdad a cambio de dinero, pero Willy no cae en chantajes. Luego inventó que Valentín la había violado.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se ve sometida una vez más a la amenaza de Camelia, quien la advierte sobre su disposición de delatar su embarazo ante Patricio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda decide a enfrentarse con Luis Mario tras la verdad que, según ella, los separa como verdaderos hermanos. Mercedes discute con su hermana Marcela.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura se ve enfrentada a la ira de Patricio, quien para salvar su descrédito publico le exige a ella deshacerse de su embarazo pero Rosaura defiende su embarazo y el derecho de su hijo a nacer.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura aprovecha su momento de una revancha en contra de Eduarda al saber que Luis Mario fue expulsado de la hacienda por su hermana, al no querer reconocerlo como un Arismendi.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano le agradece nuevamente a Camila todas las atenciones que tiene para con él, pero ella aprovecha para besarlo y pedirle que se quede con ella.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Diana le confiesa a Maximiliano que él sí es el padre de su hijo. Maximiliano asombrado y molesto, reprocha a Diana por habérselo ocultado por tanto tiempo.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: René le dice a Yolanda que él era adicto a las drogas, ante lo cual Yolanda, quien se entristece al saber que René le mintió cuando ella se lo preguntó anteriormente.

programme.title: Acorralada
programme.desc: Maximiliano está decidido a exigir sus derechos sobre su hijo, pero Diana se niega y le asegura que eso nunca va a suceder.

programme.title: Amor comprado

programme.title: Amor comprado
programme.desc: Ernesto y Mariana logran disimular para que no sepa la verdad Ricardo sobre el hecho de que Ernesto no sea su verdadero padre. Martin lleva a Ernesto a ver a Leonora.
