programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Vivi continues preparations to blow up the palace; Zorro puts his steel to the test against a lethal blade-man; Sanji tries to overcome his inability to kick a foxy lady!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Things don’t look good for the prettiest Straw Hat. Nami’s about to tangle with a thorny adversary, and the weapon Usopp built her is only good for party tricks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile reveals his sinister motives for attacking Alabasta, and Nami tries to end her duel with Miss Doublefinger by unleashing the Clima Tact’s ultimate weapon: a devastatingly lethal tornado!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro hopes to attain a new level of strength when he fights a foe with a body made of blades. The Straw Hat sword-slinger is determined to become a man who can cut steel – or die trying.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Koza – the leader of the rebel army – finally discovers the evil mastermind behind Alabasta’s drought, but is he too late to prevent further bloodshed?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Koza is mysteriously shot, the rebellion is reborn, but Vivi’s cries for a cease-fire fall on deaf ears until a long-overdue hero swoops to the rescue!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy finally discovers the secret to knocking out a sandman, but it won’t matter unless Vivi and the rest of the Straw Hats can locate the Baroque Works bomber.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While his mates search for a bomb, Luffy narrowly survives his second scrape with Crocodile. Across town, Nico Robin strong-arms Cobra into revealing his country’s greatest secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the walls crumbling down around them, Crocodile attacks Luffy with a poisoned pirate hook. Meanwhile, Vivi draws a bead on the bombers, but can she stop them in time?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats team up to give Vivi one last shot at disarming the bomb that threatens to destroy her city. She succeeds in cutting the fuse, but Crocodile has a backup plan.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Pell’s sacrifice spares his beloved city, but only an act of god can stop the rebellion. With Crocodile’s poison coursing through his body, Luffy musters a final attack against Alabasta’s oppressor.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile is defeated, the rain has returned to Alabasta, and Vivi’s people are eager to rebuild their kingdom. As for the Straw Hats, they have a fleet of marines breathing down their necks.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Now that the rebellion is over, Vivi must make an important decision about her future. The Straw Hats are ready to hoist the anchor, but an ambiguous villain has stolen the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Mr. 2 is a man of many faces, but he finally shows his true colors when the marines attack the Straw Hats. Elsewhere, Vivi has a scheme up her sleeve, and it involves Igaram wearing a dress.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew watch Alabasta fade into the distance, but there’s no time for reminiscing. The marines are in hot pursuit, and there’s a stowaway aboard the Going Merry!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Fresh off their adventure Alabasta, the Straw Hats discover an isolated island where they can restock their food supply. Chopper is left to guard the ship, but he and Nico spend the afternoon exploring instead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When a mail-order salesman gets lost at sea, Nami finds the paper she needs to start making maps. If the Straw Hat crew can somehow manage to survive a deadly cyclone, she might actually get some use out of it!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Heavy fog leads to a close encounter of the culinary kind when Nico fishes a marine out of the drink. The aspiring chef is concerned about the quality of his curry, and Sanji is just the guy to refine his recipe!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A break in the rain provides the perfect opportunity for Usopp to help a young girl fulfill her dream of launching the world’s largest firework.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Money troubles force Zoro to tangle with Dick the Bandit and his treacherous gang of thugs. These gun-toting outlaws are terrorizing a peaceful village, and the Straw Hat swordsman aims to stop their reign of terror!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A barrage of Marine cannon balls forces the Straw Hats to seek refuge on an uncharted island. Once ashore, the crew encounters a strange old man living amongst a herd of goats.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Old man Zenny made a fortune lending money to scallywags, but he always dreamed of becoming a pirate himself. When the marines set out to trap the Straw Hats, the wily hermit may finally get his wish!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zenny gets more than he bargained for when he embarks on his maiden pirate voyage. The Straw Hats may have made a friend for life, but what are they gonna do about those pesky marines?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats stop for supplies at a harbor town plagued by a mayor who taxes anything and everything. Over lunch, Luffy and Nico befriend a kooky scientist who’s obsessed with the Rainbow Mist.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Usopp, Nico, and Zoro get trapped in the Rainbow Mist along with Henzo. The aging scientist is looking for answers, the Straw Hats want treasure, and the ghosts who haunt the mist want them all to leave!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his crew search for a way out of Ape’s Concert, but the Rainbow Mist is an inescapable maze of madness. Back on shore, Nami, Chopper, and Sanji face a lifetime of hard labor for failing to pay their taxes!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami enters the mist on a mission to save her mates – and maybe hunt for treasure while she’s at it. The local mayor wants her dead, but the Straw Hats are being protected by a mysterious marine.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Looking to share a quiet, "normal" evening out with Abby, Will and his date are abducted en route to the restaurant by a desperate gang leader who faces certain death without their help.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will's transformation has him literally climbing the walls.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Tipping Point
programme.desc: As problems with his dead zone become life threatening, Johnny must decide whether to have brain surgery, knowing he might lose his psychic abilities that may help prevent Armageddon.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Broken Circle
programme.desc: Johnny (Anthony Michael Hall) fights to stop Rebecca (Sarah Wynter) from killing Greg Stillson (Sean Patrick Flanery), whom she believes is responsible for her sister's murder.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: The Collector
programme.desc: Johnny's (Anthony Michael Hall) visions of a young girl's abduction lead him on a life-and-death race to find the “collector” (Brian Markinson), a disturbed man who kidnaps and indoctrinates young women.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Double Vision
programme.desc: Johnny's (Anthony Michael Hall) ability to alter fate is put to the test when he meets a young woman (Jennifer Finnigan) with psychic abilities of her own.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Still Life
programme.desc: Johnny (Anthony Michael Hall) becomes embroiled in a murder mystery as he searches for the missing daughter of a famous artist.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Resistance fighter Paul Chandler (Bobby Dawson) resurfaces to use Lili's (Lisa Howard) stolen shuttle in a terrorist attack against the Taelon Embassy in Washington.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Resistance discovers the Taelons are training a youth corps of “volunteers” who could be used as brainwashed foot soldiers in war.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Lili (Lisa Howard) fights an addiction to a lethal street drug that may have originated in an ancient Taelon tomb.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Liam (Robert Leeshock) comes under suspicion as a saboteur when a shape-changing Karilian damages the mothership and leaves the Taelons stranded in interdimensional space.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda receives a cry for help from Rev Bam.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: After a Commonwealth planet is attacked by Pyrian pyroformers, Dylan is forced to fight to protect the new planet.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan hears voices beckoning him to a planet of "fire and ice," so he pursues, even though it means crossing hostile Nietzschean-controlled space.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: To keep their marriage fresh, a young couple turns to a life of sex games and sharing spouses, but when threesomes and foursomes lead to murder, investigators struggle to prove who killed this swinger.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A lover's quarrel and a quick cash scheme lead to the murder of a happy retiree; the Hollywood community is stunned when a body is found under its most famous landmark.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother becomes a murder victim while living a double life; a web of deception, sex and murder sends detectives on a multi-year hunt to figure out who could have murdered her.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A high-speed car chase ends with a 40-year-old newlywed shot dead in front of her husband and stepdaughter; is this a robbery gone wrong, a gang ordered hit, or something more sinister.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: The quintessential girl next door is discovered brutally killed on Thanksgiving weekend; it would take investigators over a year to uncover the dark obsession that led to her murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A foursome, a stripper, and a biker, is just the beginning for investigators of this massage table homicide; everyone is shocked as a secret fetish for murder is revealed.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found shot and stabbed in her kitchen; multiple suspects emerge, but the true mastermind of this murder hits closer to home than anyone expected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: What started as a perfect marriage evolves into a threesome; after one of the participants winds up dead, the killer turns out to be someone the investigators never suspected.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a psychic and her adult daughter are found killed under bizarre circumstances, the list of suspects grows long as investigators discover that male escorts, blackmail, fraud and love spells all played a part in this chilling double murder.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A mom starts online dating to try and cope after an unexpected tragedy, but when she gets pulled into the underbelly of the BDSM world and then disappears, investigators spend over a year unraveling this dark mystery.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A loving grandmother from a traveling community is found brutally murdered, shocking all; investigators soon uncover a web of lies, identity theft and millions in insurance fraud that point to who killed this sweet old lady.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: When a man is shot dead in bed right next to his fiancée, detectives learn that anyone's past can come back to haunt them.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A young mother is brutally murdered but despite unique evidence at the scene, it takes years to put the pieces together and bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A wealthy entrepreneur is shot in his home; there are many suspects but with only suspicion to go on, it takes investigators over seven years to nab his killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: Lust and greed are at the core of the case of a wife and mother who is found dead in her pool; investigators are quick to uncover a web of affairs, lies and fraud that lead them to her killer.

programme.title: In Ice Cold Blood
programme.desc: A single mother is found dead in a hotel stairwell and detectives quickly uncover that she had a secret life that may have led to her demise.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Underneath the dark and mysterious waters of Ashton Pond lurks a mud dragon of epic proportions!

programme.title: Chasing Walrus (With A Stubborn Photographer)
programme.desc: With the ice melted, and the walrus no-where to be seen, filmmakers Simon Stanford and Göran Ehlmé find themselves at the mercy of these arctic predators—fighting for survival in a habitat on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Secret Life of the Kangaroo
programme.desc: Raising kangaroo babies is fraught with challenges: predators, climatic extremes and very lively joeys mean that kangaroo moms face a daily struggle to keep their offspring alive.

programme.title: Hippo Supremacy
programme.desc: Zambia's Luangwa river hippos are living the easy life, or so it seems. Their life fluctuates between the serenity of sunbathing to the terrible brutality of dominance and aggression.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and Mario explore the wilds of Ohio for snapping turtles and end up catching double dragons!

programme.title: Zoo Babies

programme.title: Echo And The Elephants Of Amboseli
programme.desc: In Amboseli, nine months of unrelenting drought have given way to longed-for rains. The elephants now have enough to eat. Echo is taking the family on a day out to the Snipe River.

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote discovers a bizarre, alien-looking python millipede! Will Coyote fall victim to its potent toxin?

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote teams up with YouTube sensation Collins Key for an epic adventure in the Sonoran Desert!

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: These ocean dwelling creatures have roamed the seas since the time of the dinosaurs. Do horseshoe crabs sting?

programme.title: Brave Wilderness
programme.desc: Coyote and the crew are back in Louisiana in search of the alligator snapping turtle!

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A woman is attacked by a crocodile while swimming in an African river.

programme.title: I Was Prey
programme.desc: A man comes face-to-face with a hungry mountain lion in Colorado.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: The Gator Boys return to Mississippi to save a supersized gator.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Paul and Jimmy rescue a gator, and Tre starts gator wrestling classes.

programme.title: Gator Boys
programme.desc: Scott must thrust his arm down a crocodile's throat to remove a flip-flop.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: Chimpanzees, our closest animal relative, possess six times the strength of an average adult male and have the temperament of a five-year-old child. Despite their strength and their wild tendencies, some people believe chimps make loving companions.

programme.title: Fatal Attractions
programme.desc: In 2003, a 500-pound tiger was removed from a New York apartment in the notorious projects of Harlem. Veteran's tigers help him cope with his post-traumatic stress disorder, but another tragic story reminds us that predators can never be denied.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: North Africa
programme.desc: In the North African Sahara, Bear gets creative finding water. He treks to the coast, catches an octopus, makes shelter with acacia trees, and eats a stomach-turning bug burger breakfast of locusts and moths.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Sahara
programme.desc: In the vastness of the Sahara desert and the terrifying beauty of towering sand dunes, Bear Grylls tackles extreme survival challenges as he shows you just what it takes to get out alive even when it means eating one of the world's deadliest scorpions.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Desert Survivor
programme.desc: In the hottest place on earth, Bear Grylls shows you how to get out alive as he tackles his biggest challenge yet - skinning and disemboweling a dead camel for water, food and shelter for a night under the stars.

programme.title: Man vs. Wild: Panama
programme.desc: In the lethal mangroves and infamous viper pits of Panama, Bear Grylls tackles some extreme survival challenges and some grisly eats to show you how to get out alive.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The remaining participants, short on food, risk death in their attempt to triumph. Only one survivalist will be able to endure the wilds of Patagonia and take home the $500,000 prize.

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Crouch Recovery op Steve Hodges gets the call that a truck is stranded in a park. The stricken vehicle is stuck on a wet and muddy field that has become incredibly soft due to heavy rainfall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A 15 tonne Water Tanker has been swallowed by a Sinkhole in Wokingham town centre. Lantern lass Merrie rushes to the scene where her concern is what might lurk within.

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: Rookie Recovery Op Joe has a challenge on his hands when a delivery van slides off the road, ending up precariously balanced on the verge between a farm track and a muddy field.

programme.title: The Key to Christmas
programme.desc: When a disgruntled elf takes over the North Pole, she turns time backwards and Santa Claus begins getting younger-- fast! It's up to a loyal elf, a little girl with a magic key, and the now-teenage Santa to save the future of Christmas.

programme.title: The Truth About Christmas
programme.desc: After she tells a Christmas lie, a woman is cursed to only tell the truth when she spends the holidays with her boyfriend's family.

programme.title: A Holiday Engagement
programme.desc: Jilted by her high-powered fiancé just before Thanksgiving, and terrified of disappointing her demanding mother, Hillary Burns hires an unemployed artist to pretend to be her fiancé over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Four Christmases And A Wedding
programme.desc: When event planner Chloe (Arielle Kebbel) is hired to plan the local Christmas Festival, she is beyond thrilled to embrace the challenge. Professionally, everything is going great, but much to the dismay of her mother (Markie Post).

programme.title: The Truth About Christmas
programme.desc: After she tells a Christmas lie, a woman is cursed to only tell the truth when she spends the holidays with her boyfriend's family.

programme.title: A Holiday Engagement

programme.title: A Christmas Snow
programme.desc: Kathleen Mitchell (Catherine Mary Stewart), has carried around the unwanted memory of her father abandoning her and her mother almost 30 years ago on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: A bearded visitor turns Alex into a believer at Christmas.

programme.title: Laverne & Shirley
programme.desc: Frank DeFazio loses some of his Christmas spirit when he has to cancel his yearly gathering for the homeless and poor. The girls and friends step in to help him keep the holiday meaningful for the less fortunate.

programme.title: A Cinderella Christmas
programme.desc: The Christmasquerade Ball gives hardworking Angie a chance to let loose. She quickly charms Nicholas but has to go suddenly, leaving him only one clue to find her in this modern, holiday take on the classic fairytale.

programme.title: Sex Drive
programme.desc: When an online hottie offers to help him become a man, Ian embarks on a wild road trip to a sure thing.

programme.title: School of Rock
programme.desc: Jack Black stars as a guitarist with delusions of grandeur. Kicked out of his band and looking for work, he becomes a substitute teacher and turns his class into rock and rollers.

programme.title: Spaceballs
programme.desc: Space hero Lone Starr (Bill Pullman) and his half-canine buddy Barf (John Candy) are on a mission in their flying Winnebago to save Princess Vespa (Daphne Zuniga) from the clutches of Dark Helmet (Rick Moranis) in Mel Brooks' inspired sci-fi spoof!

programme.title: Major League II
programme.desc: The Indians are now a World Series contender. But last year's hunger is now replaced with complacency, and bad decisions by the new owner threaten to tear the team apart.

programme.title: Major League: Back to the Minors
programme.desc: Minor league pitcher Gus Cantrell is given the opportunity to manage the South Carolina Buzz. The ailing baseball team is full of a wacky lineup of terrible players, but owner Roger Dorn is banking on Cantrell to make a top-notch franchise out of them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head Do America
programme.desc: When their TV is Stolen, Beavis and Butt-head hit the road in a hilarious film debut that proves what millions of fans already know: Beavis and Butt-head RULE!

programme.title: Van Wilder: Party Liason
programme.desc: Ryan Reynolds stars as ultimate party animal and super slacker Van Wilder in this raunchy and totally outrageous National Lampoon comedy classic.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race
programme.desc: The race goes to the dogs when the queens compete in a pageant of canine inspired couture. With extra special guest judges Wynonna Judd & Rose McGowan

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: The remaining participants are finally adapting to the unforgiving environment but the search for food leads them into harm's way.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: In the brutally freezing temperatures, the hunt for food becomes the paramount focus of the remaining survivalists.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The queens must makeover family members and vogue the house down. Aubrey Plaza (Parks and Recreation) guest judges.

programme.title: RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars
programme.desc: The winner of RuPaul's Drag Race All Stars is crowned. But first, the queens must write original rap lyrics and perform as the ultimate girl group.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: It's training and steel weapons taking on brute force when a Shaolin monk and Maori warrior face-off with twin hooks, a stingray spear, Emei piercers and much more.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Scottish rebel William Wallace takes on African warlord Shaka Zulu in a showdown of weaponry that includes the Claymore sword, Iklwa spear, Targe shield and spit of poison.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four smiths must think outside the box when tasked with using the dreaded canister method to forge a signature blade. After a colorful round of testing, the two finalists must recreate the Austro-Hungarian Hussar Saber.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths plunge into the first round of competition where they must forge a blade using steel harvested from a vintage pinball machine. There's no playing around as the smiths aim to get to the next level before the clock runs out.

programme.title: The Summit
programme.desc: Sixteen strangers trek the New Zealand Alps with $1M each, facing extreme challenges and brutal twists.

programme.title: Studs
programme.desc: Will they eat each other up?

programme.title: Skin Wars
programme.desc: Time is of the essence as the remaining body artists must create beautiful and heroic warriors on an unexpected living canvas and true friends are pitted again one another in a head-to-head competition. Rebecca Romijn hosts.

programme.title: Skin Wars
programme.desc: The four remaining artists must rise to the pinnacle of body painting, creating multi-body illusions; using acrobatic contortionists as models, they are allowed to bend their naked canvases into any shape they desire.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: One model is suddenly rushed to the emergency room and the girls must post on top of an elephant.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Five people with a curious connection are abducted at the same time from a coffee shop, and the team is called to investigate. Meanwhile, Sam prepares for the birth of her baby.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: In the seventh season premiere, the team searches for a man whose missing daughter was never found. And Jack adjusts to life with his new boss (recurring guest star STEVEN WEBER).

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team is called in when an up-and-coming executive at an upscale clothing company is abducted from a taxi after attending a rooftop party in Manhattan.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: While searching for a missing white-collar criminal who disappears on his way to testify against a former associate, the team discovers there's more to the story.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team investigates when the teenage son of a Secret Service agent disappears. They discover a long-festering secret that sets in motion a deadly chain of events.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team is forced to drop one case for another after a child is kidnapped from a shopping mall and Medina (recurring guest star STEVEN WEBER) shifts all resources to the new case.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a bank manager who goes missing after an argument with a mysterious man. And Jack is reinstated as head of the department.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team searches for a missing paraplegic and unearths a secret he had been keeping.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: Jack and Samantha travel to Los Angeles to follow the trail of a man who disappears after his employee's funeral. Plus, Jack and Samantha rekindle their relationship.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a mysterious bioweapon leaves two MTA workers dead and one injured, the team rushes to determine who is behind the attack and the location of their next target.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a professional informant after he's found dead outside an abandoned factory in Red Hook. Also, Maggie reconnects with an old colleague and mentor (Joelle Carter).

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a string of armed robberies target various businesses, the team investigates a suspect who leads them to something much bigger. Also, OA worries about his future when his investments begin to go south.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When an off-duty diplomatic security agent is fatally shot in New York City trying to apprehend someone, the team investigates if there's a connection to his time working in Croatia.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The shooting of a federal corrections officer leads the team to an ex-Marine who has gone rogue ever since he returned from Afghanistan. Tiffany's sister looks to her for guidance when their younger brother begins to lash out.

programme.title: The Godfather Part II
programme.desc: The continuing saga of a young Vito Corleone growing up in Sicily and in New York during the 1910s and then following Michael Corleone in the 1950s as he tries to expand the family business.

programme.title: Mario Puzo's The Godfather Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone
programme.desc: Director/screenwriter Francis Ford Coppola's definitive new edit and restoration of THE GODFATHER: PART III, with remastered picture and sound. Michael Corleone (Pacino) seeks to free his family from crime and find a suitable successor to his empire.

programme.title: Bronson
programme.desc: With an intelligent, provocative and stylized approach, BRONSON (based on a true story) follows the metamorphosis of Mickey Peterson into Britain’s most violent prisoner, Charles Bronson.

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: After a successful heist, Porter is left for dead. Once he recovers, he seeks vengeance and wants his share of the money.

programme.title: Romper Stomper
programme.desc: A group of skinheads become alarmed at the way their neighborhood is changing.

programme.title: Cop Land
programme.desc: Director James Mangold (FORD vs FERRARI) extends his crime thriller classic that brings together a powerhouse cast, including Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta, and Harvey Keitel.

programme.title: Species: The Awakening
programme.desc: When Miranda Hollander suffers a strange blackout, she learns her true origin as a human-alien hybrid and becomes locked in battle with other hybrids. But time is running out…will she surrender to her own killer instincts in the search for a mate?

programme.title: Jeepers Creepers 2
programme.desc: The Creeper terrorizes a group of varsity basketball players, cheerleaders and coaches who are stranded on a highway after their bus breaks down. Fighting their own fears and prejudices the group of athletes are forced to come together to stay alive.

programme.title: The Prophecy
programme.desc: Oscar(r)-winner Christopher Walken stars in this supernatural thriller where the forces of Heaven and Hell fight an epic battle over mankind. Only a priest turned detective and a little girl can stop the dark angel Gabriel (Walken) and save the world.

programme.title: King of New York
programme.desc: Recently freed from prison, Frank White (Christopher Walken) begins to exterminate the drug lords who rose to power in his absence. When a group of enraged cops declares war on him, Frank's answer is to put a contract out on the cops.

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: Things go awry when car salesman Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) hires two thugs to kidnap his wife. Soon, the very pregnant and chipper Police Chief Marge Gunderson (Frances McDormand) takes the case. Is she up for the challenge? You betcha.

programme.title: Bad Ass 2: Bad Asses
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo) teams up with grumpy old agoraphobic Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) to kick ass and clean up the streets of L.A.

programme.title: Bad Ass 3: Bad Asses on the Bayou
programme.desc: Frank Vega (Danny Trejo)) and Bernie Pope (Danny Glover) return, this time to Louisiana in an attempt to find a kidnapped friend.

programme.title: Boondock Saints
programme.desc: Two Irish Catholic brothers become vigilantes and wipe out Boston's criminal underworld in the name of God.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker
programme.desc: Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.

programme.title: Bronson
programme.desc: With an intelligent, provocative and stylized approach, BRONSON (based on a true story) follows the metamorphosis of Mickey Peterson into Britain’s most violent prisoner, Charles Bronson.

programme.title: Forrest Gump
programme.desc: Tom Hanks gives an astonishing performance as Forrest, an everyman whose simple innocence comes to embody a generation.

programme.title: Quinceanera
programme.desc: As Magdalena's 15th birthday approaches, her simple, blissful life is complicated by the discovery that she's pregnant. Kicked out of her house, she finds a new family with her great-granduncle and gay cousin.

programme.title: John Grisham's The Rainmaker

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Ancient Egypt Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: In this first episode, we explore life in Ancient Egypt; the tightly packed houses where ordinary people lived, the village that was their home, how they dressed and what they ate.

programme.title: Ancient Egypt Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: In this episode, we discover a strange and mysterious world: the Ancient Egyptian afterlife. To them, life was just a dress rehearsal for the perfect afterlife they were trying to reach.

programme.title: Quest for the Lost Pharaoh
programme.desc: Unraveling the tale of a priest and his family by following the clues left to us by the ancients, Vassil Dobrev will attempt to reconstruct the past in his quest for the lost pharaoh. State of the art CGI brings the ancient necropolis to life.

programme.title: Egypt's Lost Queens
programme.desc: Prof. Joann Fletcher explores what it was like to be a woman of power in ancient Egypt. This programme brings to life the remarkable leadership and influence wielded by women whose levels of freedom were unique in the ancient world.

programme.title: The Khufu Pyramid Revealed
programme.desc: The Great Pyramids are the only wonders of the ancient world that still stand today, the greatest of which is the pyramid of Khufu. Many theories have been offered to explain its construction, but none as convincing or unique as this one.

programme.title: Ancient Gods of Egypt
programme.desc: Powerful and deadly, all-knowing, all-seeing, they were the original Masters of the Universe, prepare for the original Game of Thrones!

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The Pyramid of Khufu is the only one of the Seven Wonders of the Ancient World which can still be seen in its original state. 146 metres high, 230 metres wide, and made from almost 2.5 million blocks, the Pyramid of Khufu breaks all the records.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: At the heart of Saqqara, the largest necropolis in Egypt, which was built around 2600 BC, is the Step Pyramid of Djoser. This pyramid, with its unusual design, is the first and most complex of all.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: Meidum is the least-known of the pyramids of Egypt, but the most mysterious. It stretches skywards and resembles a castle keep. Thanks to archaeology 2.0 and its drones, scientists can delve into the heart of this building.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: On the site of Dahshur, 40 km to the south of Cairo are two revolutionary monuments which would seem to be the first real pyramids. A link in the chain, which is essential to understanding the evolution in the building of pyramids.

programme.title: The Pyramids: Solving the Mystery
programme.desc: The whole world has its eyes riveted on the Pyramid of Khufu, in Egypt. Yet, on the Giza plateau, other architectural masterpieces stand up to the test of time: the sphinx, the lion with a human head, and the pyramids of Pharaohs Khafra and Menkaure.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Eustace uses his Mountain Man knowledge to get water to flow uphill to supply his young neighbors; Jake's truck slides off an icy road leaving him stranded. Mike harvests giant driftwood logs using his amphibious boat.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Josh battles a blizzard and an onslaught of predators to protect his bison; Kidd and Harry navigate dangerous rapids to rescue a stranded pack mule; Jake responds to a mountain lion attack at a local ranch.

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Season Finale; Josh witnesses a bison give birth to the first calf of spring; Kidd and Harry load a mule into their boat and transport it downriver through raging rapids; Jake runs two mountain lions up the same tree.

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior

programme.title: Deadliest Warrior
programme.desc: Protected with chain mail and a shield, the barbaric ax-wielding Viking takes on the skill and precision of a Samurai who's armed with a katana, yumi, and metal-studded club.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul and Bogart concoct an entirely new strategy for an auction in Leaside: to have no strategy at all. Rick and Cindy play doctor, Ursula gets her geek on, and Roy rocks out with Canadian metal icon Robb Reiner.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Ursula hopes her pet chinchilla will bring her luck at an auction in East Gwillimbury, but little Monty has ideas of his own. Rick and Cindy get into watersports, Paul and Bogart make a virtue of chastity, and Roy comes to work in his pajamas.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Tensions run high between Roy and Ursula at an auction in Thornhill. Roy brings his dog for support and Ursula does her best to ignore them. Paul and Bogart hope their life coach will give them a leg up, and Cindy can't hear a word anyone is saying.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul and Bogart swore never to bring Bogart's sisters to another auction, which is why Roy brings them to one in Cambridge. Rick and Cindy try getting lucky with some models, while Ursula hopes magician Zack Mirza can make money materialize.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: After months of waiting for Cindy to set a wedding date, Rick makes a bold move at an auction in Mississauga. Roy records his memoirs for bidding posterity. Ursula finds a new place to stash her booze, and Paul and Bogart get conched on the head.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Roy antagonizes the buyers at an auction in Don Mills with free psychological analysis. Ursula tries to rein in Paul's reckless bidding habits while Bogart's away making wedding plans. Rick preaches caution, but Cindy goes for the big score.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Cindy and Rick search for fresh lockers at an auction in Toronto. Unforeseen expenses force Ursula to reconsider her attitude about stripping. Roy crashes hard. Paul and Bogart experience the merciless negotiations of Jeff Schwarz: The Liquidator.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: To his own amusement, Roy brings a mime to an auction in Corktown. Rick and Cindy arrive in a foul mood, Bogart hopes to whip Paul into shape, and Ursula aims to skewer the competition. Later, Roy gets a weather lesson from BT's Frank Ferragine.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: The buyers head to Utopia hoping that the auction lives up to its name. Roy is flush with cash and is not afraid to bribe. Ursula runs afoul of some fowl, Rick and Cindy must atone for their sins, and Paul and Bogart uncover some true dough.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Northern Treasures
programme.desc: Paul and Bogart arrive at an auction with a new “secret weapon:” Paul's inexperienced brother Barry.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the air supply failing on the Destiny, a team disembarks to a desert-like planet in search of a mineral needed to scrub the ship's air of carbon dioxide. While one team presses on to find the vital mineral, the other has another goal in mind.

programme.title: Stargate Universe

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a scientist working on stem cell research disappears, Carter, Teal'c and Quinn investigate and discover that the scientist's town is infested with Goa'uld who can only control the citizens by night. Will Carter, Teal'c and Quinn be taken over?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A Goa'uld lord holds O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) captive and tortures him for information about the Tok'ra. As O'Neill suffers, Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) appears and offers support. Meanwhile, SG-1 races to O'Neill before it's too late.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Quinn is conflicted when a professor from his home planet asks SG-1 to help stage a coup against the Kelownan government in order to stop a civil war. Should SG-1 allow the planet to destroy itself…or are they placing themselves in needless danger?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Two scientists working on an off-world research project witness SG-1 captured in a Goa'uld raid and attempt to rescue them. Little do they know that SG-1 staged the capture in order to infiltrate the Goa'uld and make contact with a Tok'ra informant.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Tok'ra must take refuge from the Goa'uld at the SGC Alpha Site occupied by Jaffa. Bad blood between the races begins to boil as an assassin wreaks havoc on the camp. Can O'Neill stop the bloodshed before the assassin escapes with coordinates?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and friends keep defeating all his ghosts, Betrayus, with the help of the demented Dr. Buttocks, decides to clone an army of Netherworld monsters. Lucky for Pac, one little monster isn't really a monster at heart.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Dr. Buttocks amps up the stakes by inventing the Molecular Magnifier to create gigantic Monsters. Meanwhile, Pac adopts the little monster that saved his life, but he's in for more trouble than he bargained for.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Lord Betrayus plans to render Pac powerless – by getting Inky, Blinky, Pinky and Clyde to feed Pac so much he'll be too full to eat anything else... power berries or ghosts! But Pac isn't getting full, even when he's eating everything in both worlds!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac and his pals grow suspicious when President Spheros starts behaving strangely. They eventually realize that Spheros has been possessed. Unfortunately, he declares Pac and pals Public Enemies and puts out a city wide Pac-Man-Hunt!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: Pac gets a huge zit right before Class Picture Day. The more stressed Pac gets about it, the more zits appear, so Betrayus sends his meanest-mouthed ghosts to stress him to the breaking point - or in this case - popping point!

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: When Pac and his pals get blasted into the past, he not only finally meets his parents -- and his Baby Pac self – but has an adventure with them during PacWorld War I.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures
programme.desc: PacWorld Kingpin Obtuse is working for Betrayus and uses Skeebo to try and steal Pac's power berries, but the plan backfires when Skeebo uses the berries to turn himself into the super-powered Heebo-Skeebo.

programme.title: PAC-MAN and the ghostly adventures

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: The gang accepts a dare from Eggman to fight him not as a group but one at a time. / In his most diabolical plan yet, Eggman decides to band together with all of Sonic's enemies.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic lets action movie star Tommy Thunder observe his "hero process,”/ Eggman discovers that an asteroid is on a collision course with the planet! It's up to Sonic and his friends to destroy it.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sticks is fed up that all the news is fluff, so she creates a podcast to speak truth to power. But things quickly spiral out of her control.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Mark the Tapir weasels his way into a position as Sonic's assistant. Eventually, Mark crosses the line and captures Sonic and his friends.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Eggman concocts a plan to have Sonic fight him underwater. Sticks discovers a mysterious figure hypnotizing the village in the middle of the night, but the gang thinks it's just Sticks' paranoia.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne shocks Cory with her pregnancy news. Amber struggles when her dog's health is deteriorates and Catelynn and Tyler are concerned that Nova might have a learning disability. Mackenzie celebrates her 26th birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: As Maci copes with the aftermath of the shooting, Cheyenne uses her platform to discuss racial injustice. Mackenzie's friends come to visit her in Florida and question her rekindled marriage. Catelynn and Tyler get news that his sister has relapsed.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne is nervous for the results of Zach's genetic test that will determine whether their unborn child will have VLCAD. After not going to Leah's birthday party, Amber tries to repair the damage caused by her absence.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Cheyenne and Zach have a gender reveal party and finally get the results of Zach's genetic test. Maci is shocked to learn that Ryan had a session with Bentley's therapist. Mackenzie pushes Josh to move to Florida permanently while Amber seeks advice.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn and Tyler are shocked when they find out the gender of their baby with an at-home test. Mackenzie goes home to Oklahoma to surprise her dad and finds out he's still struggling with depression.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Heading into her 3rd trimester, Cheyenne needs Cory to help out more with Ryder but he has other plans. Catelynn is hesitant but Tyler wants to try ketamine therapy. Mackenzie and her family celebrate her late mother's birthday.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Amber wants to pursue a college degree in Psychology. Mackenzie and Josh seek professional help for Broncs. Catelynn tries to understand Tyler's ketamine treatment. Cheyenne is devastated when her sister decides to move to DC.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Still hoping to reconnect with Leah, Amber sends her an emotional video message. Maci and Taylor worry that Maverick might be held back from going to kindergarten. While on vacation in Florida, Catelynn and Tyler meet up with Mackenzie and Josh.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn takes her career to the next level and starts taking on clients. Gary finally invites Amber over to see Leah. Mackenzie contemplates if Broncs should repeat Pre-Kindergarten. Maci and Taylor divide their time between the kids' sports.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci has a panic attack when she drives by the gas station where the shooting took place. Amber reveals that she is bisexual. Catelynn finds out that her brother has a girlfriend, so she talks to him about safe sex.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn considers having Nova in the room when she gives birth. Zach decides to pursue a real estate license but Cheyenne is concerned he will not be able to balance a newborn with a new career. Mackenzie reaches out to a parenting coordinator.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Maci attempts to explain her PTSD to Bentley while Mackenzie and Josh get advice from a parenting coordinator. Catelynn and Tyler try to wean Vaeda off her pacifier before the new baby arrives.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Catelynn & Tyler explain Carly's adoption to Nova. Cheyenne finds out she will likely be induced for the safety of her baby. Maci makes healthy lifestyle changes to help manage her PCOS. Gary invites Amber over and their reunion does not go as planned.

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: Mackenzie struggles to keep her blood sugar under control and lashes out at Josh. Gary reaches out to a parenting coach for advice on Leah and Amber's relationship. Cheyenne goes into the early stages of labor. Maci wants Taylor to see a therapist.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela le informa a la familia que Fernando será algo más que el administrador de la hacienda. Sara le confiesa a Martín que está enamorada de Franco y Ruth indaga quiénes son sus padres.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Nuevos sentimientos cambian la vida de Gabriela, sus hijas no la recordaban así desde antes de la muerte de su padre, temen de las intenciones ocultas de Fernando y buscan apoyo en los Reyes.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo saben que se avecina un inminente peligro y que no pueden marcharse de la hacienda a pesar de la nueva actitud de su madre, quien después de su boda luce 20 años más joven.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela se esmera en los arreglos de la hacienda, sus hijas presumen que siempre estuvo enamorada. Fernando asiste a una despedida de solteros con mujerzuelas, que le organiza Armando.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta pierde el control y golpea peligrosamente a Sofía, pero miente sobre lo que hizo. Es tanta la presión y la rabia, que se desmaya. Gaspar descubre las mentiras de José sobre Paula y la herencia, y está decidido a revelarlas.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: El odio por Paula une a Gaspar y a José, que se juntan para vengarse y quitarle la herencia. La guerra de Julieta llega muy lejos, derrama gasolina por toda la habitación de Paula y se inicia una pelea entre ellas, pero José impide una tragedia.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Julieta le propone a Pedro sacar del camino a Paula y a su madre, con una promesa de amor falsa que busca venganza. Paula se entera que Gaspar ya sabe sobre el plan de José, aunque la realidad es que él planea quedarse con todo el dinero.

programme.title: Los herederos del monte
programme.desc: Juan obliga a Paula a confesar sus sentimientos sin saber que ella esconde el secreto que enfrenta a Gaspar y José. Miguel y Sofía se encuentran en el granero de los del Monte, Modesto oye un ruido y, al no ver a nadie, los deja encerrados.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro entra en la habitación de Verónica y la reta: o lo manda a sacar con sus hombres o se queda para siempre en su vida. Ella distrae a la policía con las dos mujeres árabes y Lucho logra escapar, pero se queda en el pueblo. Irene no despierta.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: El Lagarto finge entregarse a Rodrigo, pero le dispara; a su vez recibe un disparo mortal de Antonia. Alejandro y Gabriela viven una noche de amor intensa, mientras el celular de Alejandro recibe sucesivas llamadas por el intento de suicidio de Irene.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica está preocupada, pues sabe que Lucho no se fue de San Pedro. La señora Guerra lleva a Rodrigo al hospital y no deja de seducirlo. Lagarto sufre un accidente.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Alejandro sufre por no poder ver a su hija y se emborracha. Verónica lo busca en el club, justo cuando Irene llega al lugar. Lucho se encarga de cuidar a Lucía. Chacón y Rodrigo están en el hospital. El comisionado besa a Antonia y Ricardo lo ve.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Gabriela le informa a la familia que Fernando será algo más que el administrador de la hacienda. Sara le confiesa a Martín que está enamorada de Franco y Ruth indaga quiénes son sus padres.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Nuevos sentimientos cambian la vida de Gabriela, sus hijas no la recordaban así desde antes de la muerte de su padre, temen de las intenciones ocultas de Fernando y buscan apoyo en los Reyes.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley copies one of his dad's old love letters and sends it to his teacher. Miss Dunbar comes to visit the Addams home and confesses to Gomez that no man has ever fallen so in love with her, leading Morticia to pretend to be the jealous wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Wednesday befriends a new boy her age, Robespierre Courtney, Morticia invites his parents, Mr. and Mrs. Henry Courtney to visit the Addams house for tea. Unbeknownst to them, the Courtney's are hoping to meet a number of the social set.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: There is a neighborhood burglar on the loose, and Morticia has reason to believe it could be Gomez. Morticia decides to probe his subconscious mind for a key to his criminality after she and Uncle Fester discover loot hidden in the storeroom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's pet plant Cleopatra gobbles up her favorite photo of Gomez from the family album. When the original photographer is found and asked to make a duplicate picture, it is discovered that he is now with the Department of Motor Vehicles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez plays host to Don Xavier Molines, a family friend during his childhood in Spain, and his daughter Consuella. Morticia's hospitality is put to the test when Consuella reveals that she has been promised in marriage to Gomez since childhood.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Wednesday's and Pugsley's faith in Santa Claus is shaken, Uncle Fester is chosen to back up Santa in case the real St. Nick is too busy to come. However, Fester-Santa gets stuck in the chimney, so each of the other adults fills in for him.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Fester is so smitten upon receipt of a photo of his love, a bearded carnival lady, that he borrows stamp money to mail her a proposal. Morticia dons a beard and poses as the mother to convince Fester that he will have to work to support a wife.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Because she thinks Fester (Jackie Coogan) and Grandmama (Blossom Rock) are spoiling the children, Morticia (Carolyn Jones) hires a governess. Insulted, Fester paints a white line down the center of the Addams house, dividing it in half.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez see Fester conferring with TV muscleman Jack LaGrann (Jack LaLanne), and think that Fester is planning a television career. However, Uncle Fester confides to Lurch that he has to go on a secret diet and exercise.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez find Grandfather Pegleg's treasure map and summon Captain Grimby. They hope to charter his boat for the treasure hunt. But after meeting the Captain, Morticia is careful to keep the nature of the mission secret.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia Frump is madly in love with Horatio Bartholomew, the man who has everything, except the truth about her relatives. Morticia, not convinced by Bartholomew, persuades playboy Cousin Itt to stir the embers of his past romance with Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Pugsley shocks his parents when he gives up his new atomic reactor as kid stuff and announces that he wants to find his own job. His first try is as a medical assistant to Dr. Bird. He turns up, scalpel in hand, ready to help during an operation.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandma Frump (guest star Margaret Hamilton), comes to the mistaken conclusion that her daughter, Morticia (Carolyn Jones), and Gomez (John Astin) plan to pack her off to an old folks home. Actually, they plan to send her to a beauty farm.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia, in order to be part of the National Beautification Program, decides to become a home decorator and offers her services to the neighbors. Next door neighbor, and insurance agent, Joe Digby hires Morticia in hopes of selling them insurance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Ophelia taunts Uncle Fester into announcing that he is going to join the Peace Corps. Fester feels he's a cinch to be accepted because Gomez plans to pull strings in Washington on his behalf. The entire family agrees to help him study for the exam.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Allyn Joslyn guest-stars as Sam Hilliard, a former truant officer who now heads a private school where Wednesday and Pugsley are enrolled. When Hilliard breaks under the strain of dealing with the Addams children, Gomez buys the school.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Dr. Marvin P. Gunderson is summoned to examine Kitty Kat, the ailing lion pet of the Addams Family. Morticia decides that it is the doctor who needs help. To build his confidence, human members of the family pretend to be ill so he can effect cures.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's concern that Lurch is overworked leads Gomez to the operating table to assemble a custom-built secondary butler. Lurch lets the robot do all the work and then begins to feel that he isn't needed anymore.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Uncle Fester incinerates the family's stuffed bear with his flamethrower, Morticia reports the accident to the insurance company. Mr. Henson the head of the company, sends his assistant, Mr. Digby, to handle the case.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch suffers from unrequited love over Tiny Trivia (guest star Diane Jergens), Morticia's visiting school chum who only has eyes for show business. The entire family decides to try to turn their stolid butler into a new personality.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Ophelia laments that she has been jilted, Morticia suggests a career as an alternative to marriage. She tries chemistry first (with explosive results) then turns to operatic singing. Cousin Itt is summoned to coach her to stardom.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez decide to keep Wednesday and Pugsley home from school after Morticia sees the fairy tales they have to read. When the truant officer comes to investigate, he is shocked at what he finds.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia calls a psychiatrist after she fears Pugsley is becoming normal after he abandons his pet octopus for a puppy and is seen wearing a Boy Scout uniform, playing with a baseball bat, and helping an old lady cross the street.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester, who has become lonely, convinces Gomez and Morticia that it is time for him to find a bride. He decides to put an ad in the newspaper, looking for love. But things go awry when a door-to-door saleswoman comes by.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Election fever grips the Addams household, as Gomez (John Astin) supports the council candidate whose campaign promise is to drain the town's disgusting bogs. Morticia (Carolyn Jones), who likes "the lovely bogs," labels the candidate an extremist.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers travel to Zanzibar, Tanzania where teams build and deliver desks to a local school. Also, tensions rise when teams face a blind double U-turn, and one team's Race may be in jeopardy when they misplace their passports.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A previously played U-turn causes friction between two teams in Tanzania.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers take on a record setting Roadblock by helping build a 13-story bonfire in Norway.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Several teams come together and target one set of Racers at the double U-turn in Italy.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams race through Venice, Italy where one team reaches a breaking point in a frantic search for a water taxi.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: While driving to the Detour, one team ends up going the wrong way, and a surprising U-turn causes friction between racers.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: An extreme fear of heights paralyzes one Racer at a Roadblock when faced with bungee jumping 240 feet from a bridge into the Corinth Canal.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An English tourist works off his reckless driving fine by being a valet and chauffeur for Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Deputy Barney Fife invests his life's savings in a used car that turns out to be a lemon.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney decides that it's time to push Andy into matrimony, but Barney's marriage bureau collapses at a frantic dinner party.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A pack of hunting dogs overruns the Mayberry Courthouse just as Andy is trying to impress a visiting state official.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally kills a bird with a slingshot and becomes foster-mother to her three young birds.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy, Barney and Gomer are a trio of laughs as they tread the boards of a haunted house.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Guest star Howard Morris plays the part of a mountain man very disgruntled with being rejected by the army.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A visiting preacher urges the residents of Mayberry to relax and enjoy the simple pleasures of life--leading to more work for all.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee is the unwilling object of matrimony when mountaineer Briscoe Darling comes a'courting.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Gossiping Gomer Pyle moves in with the sheriff when he loses his job and home at the filling station.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ron Howard's real-life father and younger brother appear as Mayberry gets involved with a gold shipment en route to Fort Knox.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie seems in line for a new bicycle as he comes home with an all A report card.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife plays cupid for Gomer when Barney's girl refuses to go to a dance unless her cousin also has a date.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney is evicted from his rooming house for illegal cooking and moves into the Mayberry sheriff's office backroom much to Andy's chagrin.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney tickets Gomer for a U-turn and is then detained in a citizen's arrest by Gomer for the same thing.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie learns a lesson in friendship when he befriends a newcomer to Mayberry.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee stirs up a crusade for a chicken farmer whose property has been condemned to make way for a new road.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney adds a vintage motorcycle to the rolling stock of the Mayberry Sheriff's department, to the Sheriff's regret.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ernest T. Bass is a would-be Romeo, who is brought into the sheriff's home in an effort to teach him some manners.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A beautiful prisoner threatens to crumble the security of the Mayberry jail, as both Andy and Barney fall for her charms.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: What does it take to rescue some of the world’s biggest, fastest and strongest animals? Find out as Jack counts down the amazing rescue stories of six special creatures. Chimps, dolphins, cheetahs, Asian elephants, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the low-lying marshes of the Okavango Delta to the deserts and grasslands, Southern Africa's landscapes are as diverse as its wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is lacing up his hiking boots and heading into the woods in search of creatures that flourish in the forest. Come along and meet cassowaries, forest elephants, koalas, bats and orangutans!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down six species that turn heads, like moose, elk, Cape Buffalo, proboscis monkeys and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Animal Adventures
programme.desc: Jack and his daughter Kathaleen travel to a remote island in the Canadian Province of British Columbia to catch sight of the rare “Spirit Bear,” an all-white Black Bear. Kathaleen also takes a behind the scenes tour of a floating lodge.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack loves elephants and if you do to, join in as he heads to Malaysia to lend a helping hand at an elephant conservation center that is working to save the endangered species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack's heading to the southern tip of Chile to bring you this adventure. Kicking off this trip in a town that pays serious homage to the famous explorer Magellan, Jack boards a boat for Magdalena Island home to a breeding colony of Magellanic Penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Armed with Armor
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack as he counts down wild creatures that come equipped with their very own body armor!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is heading to Akagera National Park in Rwanda, once devastated by poaching, to see its transformation and thriving populations of Hippos and Crocodiles and a homecoming for African Crowned Cranes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: On the Brink
programme.desc: For the animals on today’s countdown, like black rhinos, mountain gorillas and wild dogs, life is all about survival. Come along as Jack goes to ends of Earth to share seven spectacular stories of species on the brink.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Wild Countdown is turning 100! Join Jungle Jack as he celebrates by counting down his favorite adventures.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack and his family are heading to the quaint Danish town of Solvang, California! Join Jack and Julie as they get down and dirty at Lil Orphan Hammies, an amazing rescue center for pigs of all shapes and sizes.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he explores some of his favorite beaches and meets the animals that live there, like Sea Turtles, Sea Lions, and loads of other marine life!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack gets a special behind-the-scenes look at a retirement home for chimpanzees where caregivers have rescued over 250 chimps that now live in large family groups on specially designed islands in Florida.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for an epic adventure into South Africa's Zululand. All that before meeting the notorious Zulu warriors.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is in Zambia getting an up-close look at some of the toughest reptiles on the planet – fierce and dangerous Nile Crocodiles! Then he takes a walk on the wild side with white rhino, giraffe, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the largest African elephant Jack has ever seen, to the littlest elephants on the planet…come along for the journey of a lifetime with the biggest land mammals on the planet!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jack and Suzi as they meet some mighty meerkats living in California's desert, and visit a wolf sanctuary dedicated to saving the misunderstood species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Creatures of the Night
programme.desc: Prepare for a fright as Wild Countdown is venturing into the night! Stealthy hunters equipped with night vision, giants so powerful they could crush you with a single step, plus bats, rats and deadly vipers!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: A Nose Knows
programme.desc: Feeling nosey? Today’s Countdown has got you covered with some of the most notorious noses in the animal kingdom. Seven remarkable stories of creatures that use their noses to flirt, fight and even shower!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Travel with Jack, and his wife Sue, to beautiful Cape Town as they discover how South Africa's wildlife is faring in the big city! Then they hit the beach to hang out with a breeding colony of African Penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Island Hopping
programme.desc: From the Florida Keys to Grand Cayman and all the way to Fiji, we’re going island hopping on today’s Wild Countdown! Most visitors hit the beaches, but ole’ Jungle Jack heads straight to the rare and unique wildlife.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is heading to Zimbabwe! Just around the corner from majestic Victoria Falls, the folks at Elephant Camp are working to provide a home to orphaned Elephants in need. Jack assists the team in radio collaring a soon-to-be-released female.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack on a whale-watching safari to Catalina Island where he meets a Humpback Whale, Fin Whale, loads of Dolphins, California Sea Lions, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack on an amazing safari through Kenya's Masai Mara as he braves the rushing Mara River filled with Hippos and Nile Crocs. Then Jack explores wildlife after dark.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his wife Sue as they pay a visit to the sunny state of Florida's most unique and inspirational retirement home. They meet up with an amazing couple who is spending their golden years providing a safe and peaceful retirement for horses.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is taking his show on the road through sunny California!

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto try to mediate between a peaceful American Indian chief and a gang of prejudice cowboys.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A boy's love for his dog provides a clue for the Lone Ranger and Tonto as they search for the boy's missing father.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto restore justice and happiness in a farmer's life.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: A reformed outlaw becomes concerned when financial problems prevent him from adequately caring for his sick wife.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto set a trap for outlaws posing as members of the cavalry.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: The son of a prominent rancher is shot in the back while tracking poachers.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto intervene when robbers wearing face masks terrorize Peaceful Valley.

programme.desc: The Lone Ranger and Tonto attempt to restore order in a town plagued by murders, lynchings and rustling.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger
programme.desc: An ambitious housekeeper plans to get control of an elderly rancher's vast estate.

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.title: The Lone Ranger

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The captain's daughter is put in a tough situation she is accused of stealing supplements from Doc's office. Then, Gopher's uncle (Red Button) falls in love with the lady who runs the ship's gift shop.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The vivacious Hannah Harvye (Mary Martin) immediately becomes involved with the crew and rekindles a romance with an old flame. An unassuming man (Ben Murphy) finds himself in a tight situation with a maid he's never met. Gopher saves a man's life.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Glamour and dancing feet hit the deck in the season premiere as "The Love Boat" Mermaids join the crew for fun and adventure on the high seas.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Vicki experiences difficulty with the tough manager of the music group The Temptations when she tries to get them to perform for passengers. A loan shark offers a customer a bizarre deal. Also, Captain Stubing becomes involved in a kidnapping.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Andy Warhol makes an appearance on the 200th episode of The Love Boat in which a woman tries to avoid Warhold, a man and his wife search for a valuable stamp, and Ace gets upset about his wages.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: The crew and passengers encounter love, adventure, and romance during a cruise to the Riviera.

programme.title: The Love Boat
